title: Careers
content:
IIIT Naya Raipur is an institution of higher learning in Information and Communication Technology and related fields. It aspires to nurture and develop top notch scientists, engineers, leaders and entrepreneurs to meet the needs of the industry and society. We are actively looking for  faculty and staff   to join and contribute to this mission. 
 
 Certain positives of Naya Raipur region 
 
 This capital region is a hub of National and State level academic and research institutes including the Indian Institute of Management, AIIMS, HNLU, NIT, IG Agriculture University, Ravi Shankar University among several others. 
 
 Naya Raipur is the born smart city of modern India offering tier I city infrastructure away from the hustle and bustle of typical metro city. 
 
 The excellent infrastructure, cultural richness, low cost of living and good international schools in the region make it an ideal destination to support a family.

title: WHY ONE SHOULD JOIN IIIT-NR
content:
INNOVATIVE ACADEMICS 
 
 IIIT-NR academics has several innovative features, which differentiates it from other similar institutes and helps students acquire skills necessary for their profession. Some of the salient features are: 
 
 Engineering courses right from First semester instead of 12th++ courses in First year 
 
 Skill First, Theory Later, Projects Integrated model for sound foundation of fundamentals 
 
 Fractal Academics with  short modular courses to enable inclusion of latest technologies in course curriculum 
 
 'T'-Education model to enable students to acquire both breadth and depth of knowledge 
 
 Course curriculum judiciously designed to offer balanced exposure to both Hardware and Software with diverse set of tools (such as Arduino, Rasberry Pi, Sensor, RTL-SDR, Python, C, MATLAB, Cadence, Oracle etc.) for hands-on experience 
 
 Fosters project-based learning with FOUR mini projects, one each in 4th, 5th, 6th and 7th semester and ONE major project in 8th semester. A student can choose to do the same project from 5th to 8th semester for increased depth, or different projects for increased breadth 
 
 Elective subjects and multidisciplinary project options encourage students to develop interdisciplinary skills 
 
 Strong Industry-linkages for internships and industry-elective subjects in course curriculum 
 
   
 
 STATE-OF-THE-ART RESEARCH LABS 
 
 IIIT-NR has set up state-of-the-art labs with latest hardware and software tools in cutting edge technology areas. Some of these labs are: 
 
 Data Science Lab 
 
 Antenna and Microwave Circuit Design Lab 
 
 Electronic Circuits Lab 
 
 Networks Design & Analysis Lab 
 
 Communication Systems Lab 
 
 VLSI & Embedded Systems Lab 
 
 Artificial Intelligence and Deep Leaning (AIDL) Lab 
 
 IOT & Sensors Lab 
 
 SEMESTER ABROAD (INTERNATIONAL) OPPORTUNITIES 
 
 IIIT-NR offers a unique financial-aid facility to its students for international exposure. The key features are: 
 
 Grant of up to Rs. Five Lakhs to 20 students from every batch for carrying out their final semester internship/project at a reputed Foreign University/Institute. 
 
 The project/work done is counted towards total credits of their formal education program 
 
 RESEARCH & INNOVATION 
 
 IIIT-NR fosters Research & Innovation and offers financial-aid to its students for pursuing research. The key features are: 
 
 Encourages students by providing them financial support to participate in National/International Conferences, Seminars, Symposiums, Workshops to present their research work 
 
 Encourages students to publish their research work in journals and conferences 
 
 Provides financial support to students to prepare prototypes and for experimentation 
 
 OVERALL PERSONALITY DEVELOPMENT 
 
 IIIT-NR pays special attention to its students for their overall personality development. Some of the key initiatives towards this include: 
 
 Nurtures a campus culture with high ethical standards 
 
 Institute extra-curricular activities are student driven to help students develop leadership, team spirit, sense of responsibility, time management, financial management, communication skill, inter-personal skill and many other soft skills, which are necessary for professional success 
 
 Student Activity Centre (SAC), consisting of various types of clubs, is completely managed by the students. SAC also conducts many extra-curricular activities. 
 
 Focussed on soft skills development, specially designed Workshops, Social Events and Invited talks are frequently organized 
 
 The institute helps students identify and pursue their PASSION 
 
 EXTRACURRICULAR ACTIVITIES 
 
 IIIT-NR encourages its students to participate in extracurricular activities and offers financial-aid to its students for participation in such events. The key features are: 
 
 The institute has in-house facilities for sports and extracurricular activities 
 
 Encourages participation in outside competitions in both Team and Individual events/sports 
 
 Provides financial support of up to Rs. 10,000/- for participation in such events.

title: B. Tech Admission 2025
content:
Academic Calendar First Semester  Classes will commence from 25th August 2025 . 
 
 Aspire Scholarship Program 
 
 Orientation2025 schedule  
 
 B. Tech. Admissions 2025: Spot Round Allotment 
 
 B.Tech Spot Admission 2025 
 
 Click here for  JOSAA (All India) candidates reporting: 
 
   Candidates admitted under the CG and NTPC quotas are required to report to the institute starting  24th August 2025 . Hostel rooms will be allotted on the same day, and the allotment details will be shared via email. 
 
 IIIT-NR Guest house is  completely  occupied. May contact private Guest Houses at sector 27, 29. 
 
 
 
 
 
 If any student plans to arrive at IIIT Naya Raipur before the reporting date,  temporary accommodation will be arranged  until they are allotted a permanent room in the first-year hostel. 
 
 Each student in the first-year hostel will be provided with a  bed, mattress, study table, and chair . 
 
 For personal shopping needs, a local market is available at  Sector 24 , approximately  2 km  from the campus. 
 
 Due to the absence of any seat cancellations, the Third Upgradation List will not be released.

title: B.Tech Spot Round 2025
content:
Orientation2025 schedule  
 
 B. Tech. Admissions 2025: Spot Round Allotment 
 
 IIIT NR invites online applications to fill the vacant CSE, ECE, and DSAI seats. Candidates with valid JEE (MAINS) 2025 rank can participate in the Spot counselling. The applicants must register using the following link for a non-refundable fee of Rs. 500/-.  
 
 Click Here to Apply online 
 
 Timeline for SPOT Admission: 
 
 
 
 Start date for online applications 
 
 
 
 09th August 2025 
 
 
 
 
 Last date for online applications 
 
 
 
 22nd August 2025, 5PM 
 
 
 
 
 Spot Counselling 
 
 
 
 23th August 2025 
 
 
 
 
 Academic session starts 
 
 
 
 25th August 2025 (reporting to campus 24th August 2025) 
 
 
 Vacancy Chart as of 19/08/2025 (will be updated timely) 
 
 
 
 CSE 
 7 
 
 DSAI 
 2 
 
 ECE 
 12 
 
 Total 
 21 
 
 
   
 
 Instructions for Participation in Spot Counselling – B.Tech Admission 2025 
 
 All vacant seats are under the Open Category (All India). 
 
 Eligibility: 
	 
 
 The eligibility criteria for Spot Counselling are the same as those prescribed by JoSAA. 
 
 Only candidates with a valid JEE (Main) 2025 CRL rank are eligible to participate. 
 
 
 Mandatory Online Registration: 
	 
 
 All candidates must register online to participate in the Spot Counselling. 
 
 Candidates who do not register online will not be allowed to participate. 
 
 Applicants who had earlier registered for the regular rounds of counselling must register again for the Spot Round and pay the non-refundable fee of ₹500/-. 
 
 
 Physical Reporting: 
	 
 
 Physical presence at the IIIT-NR campus is mandatory for participating in Spot Counselling. 
 
 Registered candidates must report to the auditorium at IIIT Naya Raipur on 23rd August 2025, between 10:00 AM and 12:30 PM. 
 
 Upon arrival, candidates must sign the physical attendance register placed at the entrance of the auditorium. 
 
 Candidates who fail to register their physical presence will be treated as absent, even if they have completed online registration, and will be ineligible to participate in the counselling process. 
 
 
 Merit List & Seat Allotment: 
	 
 
 A merit list of physically reported candidates will be prepared based on their JEE (Main) 2025 CRL. 
 
 Seats will be allotted strictly according to this merit list, subject to availability. 
 
 
 Admission Formalities: 
	 
 
 Candidates who are allotted a seat must complete the following on the same day:
 
 Document Verification 
 
 Full Fee Payment of ₹1,27,150/- 
 
 
 Failing to complete these formalities within the allotted time will lead to cancellation of the seat, which will be immediately offered to the next candidate on the merit list. 
 
 
 Fee Payment Options: 
	 
 
 By Demand Draft/Pay Order in favour of “Director IIIT Naya Raipur” , payable at Raipur, Chhattisgarh. 
 
 Or through online payment via debit card, credit card, UPI, or net banking. 
 
 
 Already Admitted Candidates: 
	 
 
 Candidates who are already admitted to IIIT-NR through regular rounds under any quota (All India or CG or NTPC) may also participate in the Spot Round. 
 
 Online registration is mandatory in such cases. 
 
 If allotted a preferred branch, the previous allotment will be cancelled, and the new branch will be assigned. 
 
 The already paid fee will be adjusted, and a processing fee of ₹2,000/- will be deducted. 
 
 
 Final Decision: The decisions made by the Admission and Counselling Committee regarding seat allotment shall be final and binding. 
 
 Documents: The candidates must bring the following documents in their original and one set of photocopies. 
 
 
 
 S. No. 
 
 
 
 Details 
 
 
 
 
 1 
 
 
 
 10th Marks Sheet and 10th Pass Certificate (if available) 
 
 
 
 
 2 
 
 
 
 12th Marks Sheet and 12th Pass Certificate (if provided by respective Board) 
 
 
 
 
 3 
 
 
 
 Transfer Certificate in original 
 
 
 
 
 4 
 
 
 
 Migration Certificate in original 
 
 
 
 
 5 
 
 
 
 Character Certificate in original 
 
 
 
 
 6 
 
 
 
 JEE (Main) 2025 Rank Card showing CRL 
 
 
 
 
 7 
 
 
 
 Photo Identity Card [issued by govt. agency/last attended school/class XII admit card] 
 
 
 
 
 8 
 
 
 
 Document supporting Permanent Address (for all categories) 
 
 
 
 
 9 
 
 
 
 Medical fitness certificate from a Govt. registered medical practitioner in the format provided by JoSAA. 
 
 
 
 
 10 
 
 
 
 4 copies of color passport size photographs 
 
 
 
 
 11 
 
 
 
 Filled the Anti-ragging undertaking from the following website 
 
 https://www.antiragging.in/affidavit_university_form.php 
 
 and bring the signed copy of online anti-ragging affidavit generated on the website 
 
 
 
 
 12 
 
 
 
 *Demand Draft/Pay order (In favour of “Director IIIT-Naya Raipur”, Payable at Raipur Chhattisgarh) etc. for an amount of Rs 1,27,150/- . An online payment facility is also available. 
 
 
 
 
 13 
 
 
 
 Submitted application form printout

title: MTech (DSAI) with CMIT Fellowship
content:
M. Tech (Data Science and Artificial Intelligence) 
 
 Chief Minister (CM) IT Fellowship Program Admission 2025 
   
 Orientation2025 schedule  
 MTech in DSAI under CMIT Fellowship Round II allotment 
 CMIT MTech DSAI First list of Allotment. 
 Merit list of CMIT M.Tech Fellowship  
 Answersheet of CMIT M.Tech Skill test  
 
 "Candidates having any objection may report it to the   cmit-mtech@iiitnr.ac.in   by 08/08/2025, 5:00 PM." 
 СМІТ М. Tech. Admissions 2025: List of Eligible applicants to Skill Test 
 СМІТ М. Tech. Admissions 2025: List of NOT Eligible applicants  
 Skill Test Pattern and Syllabus 
 
 The CM IT Fellowship Program aims to empower and train the local young professionals in the  field of Software-Driven Analysis. The programme is exclusively for Chhattisgarh-domiciled candidates , ensuring local talent is nurtured for the state’s development. The program is structured in collaboration with multiple stakeholders,  including   
 
 ∙ Chhattisgarh Infotech Promotion Society (CHiPS) 
 
 ∙ IIIT Naya Raipur 
 
 ∙ Various Government departments of Chhattisgarh. 
 
 The MTech program in Data Science and Artificial Intelligence (DSAI ) is designed to provide participants with deep technical expertise while  involving them in meaningful governance projects, enhancing their skills for both personal and societal growth. 
 
 Key features of the program: 
 
 Fellowship: Rs 50000 per month in both 1st and 2nd years Sponsored by Govt. of Chhattisgarh . 
 
 Tuition Fee: Fully Sponsored by the Govt. of Chhattisgarh 
 
 Laptop/Desktop will be provided with all the necessary software at free of cost by the Govt. of Chhattisgarh. 
 
 Blended learning approach (in-person classes + Govt Dept engagement). 
 
 Unparalleled Exposure : The MTech program integrates* (a) classroom learning at IIIT-Naya Raipur, and (b) Real-world governance experience in key administrative offices such as State Departments and District Collectorate. 
 
 3 months Academic Session and 3 month Govt Engagement each semester in the first year, and 2 month Academic Session and 9 months Govt Engagement in the Second year. 
 
 Career Advantage : Graduates will develop proficiency in emerging technologies like Data Science and Artificial Intelligence, equipping them to address challenges within the public sector. This aligns with the growing trend of applying AI in government to enhance efficiency and service delivery. 
 
 Lodging and Boarding : The admitted candidates will be provided lodging and boarding in the hostels as per the rules of IIIT NR on the payment basis during their stay IIIT NR for academic engagement. 
 
 Mode of Learning 
 
 Blended learning approach (in-person classes + Government Department engagement). In government Engagement, Fellows would get a chance to work in a Governance project envisaging practical experience. 
 
 
 
 Year 1 
 
 
 
 Semester 1 
 
 
 
 Semester 2 
 
 
 
 
 Academic Session 
 
 (3 Months) 
 
 
 
 Govt. Dept.  Engagement (3 Months) 
 
 
 
 Academic Session (3 Months) 
 
 
 
 Govt. Dept.  
 
 Engagement 
 
 (3 Months) 
 
 
 
 
 Year2 
 
 
 
 Academic Session 
 
 (2 Months) 
 
 
 
 Govt. Dept.  Engagement (4 Months) 
 
 
 
 Govt. Dept.  
 
 Engagement 
 
 (5 Months) 
 
 
 
 Academic  
 
 Session 
 
 (1 Month) 
 
 
 Program Eligibility and Admission Criteria: 
 
 A candidate seeking admission into CM Fellowship MTech in DSAI has to satisfy the following requirements: 
 
 o Nationality: The candidate must be a citizen of India and Domicile of Chhattisgarh . 
 
 o Age Limit – upto 30 years^ as of the application deadline. Age relaxations are as per Chhattisgarh Govt. reservation rules. 
 
 o Any graduate or post graduate student with GATE (in CS/DSAI) qualified and a minimum CPI# of 6.5 or 60% or First Class in the qualifying degree (5% marks or 0.5 CPI is relaxed for SC/ST/PwD Candidates). 
 
 Reservation Policy: 
 
 Reservation is applicable as per the Chhattisgarh State Reservation Policy. 
 
 Admission and selection process: 
 
 Admission process: Candidates desirous of seeking admission in M.Tech. (DSAI) CM IT Fellowship Programs must apply through the IIIT NR Admission portal https://erp.iiitnr.edu.in/OnlineApplicationRegistrationAndLogin.action . Each applicant has to pay Rs. 500/-. Offline  applications or applications via email will not be considered. 
 
 Selection process: All the eligible candidates will be called for a skill test. A merit list is prepared based on the percentile of GATE (70% weightage) and marks obtained in the skill test (30 %weightage) . As per the reservation rules of Govt. of Chhattisgarh , the meritorious candidates from the merit list will be offered admission (the first round allotment). 
 
 If any seat is left vacant, a second round of allotment list will be prepared. However, vacant reservation seats can not be offered to the unreserved candidates. In case of unavailability of suitable candidates against reserved seats, those seats are left vacant. 
 
 Schedule: 
 
 
 
   
 
 
 
 Timeline 
 
 
 
 
 Call for Applications 
 
 
 
 17th July - 31st July, 5PM 
 
 
 
 
 Announcement of list of eligible candidates for Skill Test 
 
 
 
 2nd August 
 
 
 
 
 Skill Test 
 
 
 
 7th August 
 
 
 
 
 1st round allotment 
 
 
 
 9th August 
 
 
 
 
 Reporting at IIIT NR for document verification 
 
 
 
 11th August - 14th August, 5 PM 
 
 
 
 
 2nd round of allotment* 
 
 
 
 16th August 
 
 
 Applicants must read the Information Brochure for M.Tech. Admission of the institute for eligibility criteria,  Admission category, Research areas and other details. In case of any issues please mail us  at  cmit-mtech@iiitnr.ac.in 
 
 Click here to download format for Anti-ragging Affidavit to be submitted at the time of Admission 
 
 Click Here to download the OBC_NCL certificate format to be issued on or after 1st April 2025 
 
 skill Test Pattern and Syllabus 
 
 Frequently Asked questions: 
 
   
 
 1. Placement Participation 
  Q: Are CMIT M.Tech (DSAI) fellows eligible to participate in campus placement drives along with other M.Tech students? 
  A: Yes, CMIT M.Tech fellows are permitted to participate in campus placement drives as applicable to the other academic programs of IIITNR. However, joining any company is only allowed after successful completion of the M.Tech program. Any deviation from this may invoke the bond clause. 
 
 
 
 
 2. Fellowship Eligibility 
  Q: Can a CMIT M.Tech fellow with a valid GATE score receive the AICTE fellowship of ₹12,500 in addition to the CMIT fellowship? 
  A: No. A student cannot avail of two fellowships simultaneously. 
 
 
 
 
 3. Mode of Skill Test 
  Q: Will the skill test be conducted online or offline? 
  A: The skill test will be conducted in offline mode . 
 
 
 
 
 4. Skill Test Syllabus 
  Q: What syllabus or content will the skill test cover? 
  A: Please refer to the official brochure or the program’s webpage for syllabus details. 
 
 
 
 
 5. Residential Requirement 
  Q: Is it mandatory for CMIT M.Tech fellows to reside on campus during the program? 
  A: Yes, IIIT Naya Raipur is a fully residential campus. All students are required to stay on campus. 
 
 
 
 
 6. Mid-Program Placement 
  Q: What if a CMIT M.Tech fellow receives a placement offer during the course of the program (on-campus or off-campus)? 
  A: Students may only accept such offers after completing the program. Early joining would trigger the bond clause. 
 
 
 
 
 7. Post-Program Government Opportunities 
  Q: Are there guaranteed government job opportunities for CMIT M.Tech fellows after program completion? 
  A: There is no provision of any guaranteed Government jobs. However,  it is up to the prevalent norms & rules of Government of Chhattisgarh to consider or not the fellows of the program after the completion  of the course. 
 
 
 
 
 8. Academic Fee Coverage 
  Q: Does the fellowship cover all academic fees such as tuition, registration, examination, and hostel fees? 
  A: The Government of Chhattisgarh sponsors only the tuition fee. Other expenses including hostel accommodation, mess, examination fees, medical insurance, SAC charges, etc., must be borne by the fellows. 
 
 
 
 
 9. Accommodation During Government Department Engagement 
  Q: Will accommodation be provided during government department assignments? Will hostel facilities at IIIT-NR be available if the posting is outside campus? 
  A: Fellows will be provided accommodation within the IIIT-NR campus throughout the duration of the program. 
 
 
 
 
 10. Equivalence with Regular M.Tech (CSE) 
  Q: Is the CMIT M.Tech program equivalent to the regular M.Tech in CSE? 
  A: Yes, the CMIT M.Tech program is academically equivalent to the regular M.Tech in CSE. Though each and every academic program has its own program structure and curriculum.

title: M.Tech Admission 2025
content:
Academic Calendar First Semester 
 Orientation2025 schedule  
 
 M. Tech. Admission 2025 (Spot): Allotment List 
 Notification for Spot Admission M. Tech (CSE / ECE) All India Spot Round 2025 
 
 IIIT Naya Raipur invites applications to full time M.Tech. programs in Computer Science & Engineering and Electronics & Communication Engineering for the year 2025-2026. Admission to the M.Tech. program of the Institute is open to all Indian Nationals in the following specializations and Seat Matrix: 
 
 Computer Science and Engineering (Intake :20 seats) 
 
                       Specializations: (a) Data Science and Artificial Intelligence 
 
                                                    (b) Information Security 
 
 Electronics and Communication Engineering (Intake :20 seats) 
 
                        Specializations: (a) Communication and Signal Processing 
 
                                                     (b) VLSI and Embedded System 
 
 There are three different categories through which students are admitted: 
 
 All India Quota (35% seats amounting to 14(+2 EWS) seats: 07+1 in CSE and 07+1 in ECE): Applicants who completed their school education from any part of India belong to this category.  Reservation as per GOI Norms. For    All   India   quota    seats, please   refer   to   CCMT 2025   information   brochure https://ccmt.admissions.nic.in/ 
 
 NTPC Quota (15% seats amounting to 06 seats: 03 in CSE and 03 in ECE): Applicants employed with NTPC or their wards who have completed their school education from any part of India belong to this category. Reservation as per GOI Norms 
 
 Chhattisgarh State Quota (50% seats amounting to 20 seats: 10 in CSE and 10 in ECE): Applicants who passed both 10th and 12th standard examinations from schools situated in the State of Chhattisgarh belong to this category. The reservation for candidates belonging to SC, ST and OBC categories shall be as per Chhattisgarh Government norms. 
 
 Candidates desirous of seeking admission in IIIT-NR under CG State or NTPC quota must apply online on the Institute website https://erp.iiitnr.edu.in/OnlineApplicationRegistrationAndLogin Offline applications or applications via email will not be considered. 
 
 
 
 COUNSELING SCHEDULE (regular rounds) 
 
 
 
 Date 
 
 
 
 
 Application submission start 
 
 
 
 10th May 2025 
 
 
 
 
 Last date of application submission 
 
 
 
 8th July, 2025 17:00 hrs 
 
 
 
 
 Announcement of 1st Round Selection list 
 
 
 
 10th July 2025 
 
 
 
 
 Payment of Admission Fee, Document Verification, specifying willingness for 1st Round 
 
 
 
 10th to 17th July 2025 
 
 
 
 
 Internal Examination for Non GATE candidates 
 
 
 
 16th July 2025 ( Reporting at 10:00am and Examination at 11:00 am) 
 
 
 
 
 Announcement of 2nd Round Selection list 
 
 
 
 18th July 2025 
 
 
 
 
 Payment of Admission Fee, Document verification, specifying willingness for 2nd Round 
 
 
 
 18th July to 28th July, 2025 
 
 
 
 
 Announcement of 3rd Round Selection list 
 
 
 
 29th July 2025 
 
 
 
 
 Payment of Admission Fee, Document verification, specifying willingness for 3rd Round 
 
 
 
 29th July to 5th August, 2025 
 
 
 Some key features of M. Tech. program in IIIT-NR are listed below. 
 
 IIIT-NR is mentored by a highly eminent board consisting of Mr. Saurabh Srivastava (Co-founder and former Chairman of NASSCOM), and other visionaries from Academia and Industry. 
 
 IIIT-NR is committed to bringing to the Institute the best of the faculty and resources to enable students to create solutions for today’s problems and products for the needs of the country, esp. the underprivileged. 
 
 In admission the priority will be given to the candidates having valid GATE score and non-GATE candidates need to appear for an institute entrance examination. 
 
 Eligible Applicants admitted to M. Tech. Program will receive a monthly scholarship of Rs.12, 400/- as per the AICTE norms. 
 
 Institute encourages M. Tech. students to present their research work at national and international conferences in India & abroad and provide financial assistance of Rs. 30,000/- and 1,00,000/-, respectively. 
 
 Institute provides financial assistantship up to 5 Lakhs for selected candidates for One Semester long research program in abroad. 
 
 Applicants must read  Information Brochure for M.Tech. Admission  of the institute for eligibility criteria, Admission category, Research areas and other details. In case of any issues please mail us at  mtech_admissions@iiitnr.ac.in

title: Ph.D. Admission Spring Semester-2026
content:
ADDENDUM NOTIFICATION RESULT OF Ph.D. ADMISSION, SPRING 2026 
 
 Results of Ph.D. Admission Spring 2026 
 
   
 
 Medical Fitness Certificate 
 
 List of candidates shortlisted for written Exam for Ph.D. Admission Spring 2026 
 
 IIIT-Naya Raipur invites applications for admission to the Ph.D. Program in all disciplines of Engineering, Science, English, and Management. The goal of these programs at IIIT-NR is to prepare the scholars for becoming global academic, industrial and R&D leaders. 
 
 Some key features of Research program in IIIT-NR are listed below. 
 
 IIIT-NR is committed to bringing to the Institute the best of the faculty and resources to enable students create solutions for today’s problems and products for the needs of the country, esp. the underprivileged. 
 
 Scholars admitted to Ph.D. program under regular Institute Scholar scheme (full time) are eligible for the Institute Teaching/Research Assistantship of Rs 37000/- per month, as per MHRD guidelines. 
 
 Students are encouraged to present research papers at reputed conferences and for which the institute supports financially as per the norms of IIIT Naya Raipur. 
 
 Applicants must read  Information Brochure for Ph.D. Admission  of the institute for eligibility criteria, Admission category, Research areas and other details. 
 
 Important Dates: 
 
 Application starting date: 12th November-25                
 
 Extended date of closure of application: 15th December-25 (Monday) 
 
 Disclosure of shortlisted candidates: 19 th December-25 (Friday) 
 
 Written test and Interview: 5th January-26 (Monday) 
 
 Results Declaration: 9th January-26 (Friday) 
 
 Reporting to institutions: 1 9th January-26 (Monday) 
 
 This time the institute scholar category admissions are available only in CSE, ECE and Physics. Admissions for other categories will remain open to all departments. 
 
 Application Process: 
 
 Please read the instructions given below before filling up the application form. 
 
 All applications will be received through online portal of IIIT Naya Raipur only. An applicant has to register online by filling the required details. The login credentials will be provided to the applicant on an email used for registration. 
 
 The applicant has to login with details received and complete the application by providing all the necessary information. Please note that the applicant has to upload the testimonials wherever it is required to validate the information along with photograph and signature. 
 
 After completion of filling the application, the applicant will be directed to the payment gateway. Once the payment is done successfully, the applicant will be asked to confirm the final submission of the application. 
 
 After the final submission, an acknowledgement of payment along with the copy of the application will be provided for future reference. 
 
 The applicant has to carry the print out of this application along with all the attachments and their originals during the written test/interview. 
 
 The applicant has to register separately (the same email id can be used) to apply for multiple disciplines and payment also to be made separately. 
 
 Please read the instructions given in the Ph.D. information brochure carefully before filling up the  application form . 
 
 All annexures are available in information Brochure. 
 
 Contact: For any clarification, you may contact us through email at  phd_admissions@iiitnr.ac.in

title: FAQs
content:
To which university and technical board the Institute is affiliated? 
 
 
 
 The Institute in itself is a State University established by the Government of Chhattisgarh and recognized by UGC. 
 
 
 
 
 
 When was the institute established? 
 
 
 
 The first academic session of the institute commenced from Aug 2015 in its own campus. 
 
 
 
 
 
 What are the programs offered? 
 
 
 
 The Institute currently offers the following programs:- 
 
 a) 4 Years B.Tech. in (ECE) 
 
 b)4 Years B.Tech. in (CSE) 
 
 c)4 Years B.Tech. in (DSAI) 
 
 d)2 Years M.Tech. in (CSE) 
 
 e)2 Years M.Tech. in (ECE) 
 
 f) Ph.D. in (ECE) 
 
 g) Ph.D. in (CSE) 
 
 h) Ph.D. in (Physics) 
 
 i) Ph.D. in (Mathematics) 
 
 j) Ph.D. in (English) 
 
 k) Ph.D. in (Management) 
 
 
 
 
 
 When does admission for B.Tech programs begin? 
 
 
 
 The admission to B.Tech programs begins in May-June. 
 
 
 
 
 
 What is the admission criteria for B.Tech. programs? 
 
 
 
 Admission to the undergraduate program of the DSPM IIIT-NR is based strictly on the merit of the candidate as inferred from their performance in JEE (Joint Entrance Examination). The minimum eligibility for applying for the B.Tech program under Chhattisgarh quota at IIIT-NR is 50% aggregate marks in Physics and Mathematics (45% for SC/ST/OBC/PWD candidates) in their 12th standard examination. The eligibility for applying for the B.Tech program under All India category and NTPC quota is as per JoSAA guidelines. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Is Ph.D. offered at IIIT-NR? 
 
 
 
 Yes.  Please visit Admission section at our website for further details. 
 
 
 
 
 
 When does admission for Ph.D. programs begin? 
 
 
 
 The admission for Ph.D. programs usually takes place at the beginning of each semester (i.e June for Autumn semester and December for Spring semester) 
 
 
 
 
 
 Is ragging prohibited in IIIT-NR? 
 
 
 
 Ragging of any kind is strictly prohibited in the Institution. As per the directions of the Hon'ble Supreme Court of India, if any incident of ragging comes to the notice of the authorities, the concerned student will be given liberty to explain and if his explanation is not found satisfactory, he or she will be expelled from the Institution. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Are there any scholarships available for B.Tech students? 
 
 
 
	Financial aid to the needy students is under active consideration of the Govt. Of Chhattisgarh. Any student entitled for financial aid as approved by the Govt. will get back to the refund from already paid fees.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Are there any seats reserved for female candidates? 
 
 
 
 For admission to its programs under CG Quota , the institute follows the Chhattisgarh State Government policy on reservation of 30% to Women. However , for admission under All India Quota & NTPC , Government of India policy on reservation applies. 
 
 
 
 
 
 What are the documents required to be submitted at the time of admission? 
 
 
 
 Please follow instructions available on the website  as part of the application process. 
 
 
 
 
 
 How many students will be admitted to B.Tech. program ? 
 
 
 
 Please see the Admission Brochure. 
 
 
 
 
 
 What is the strength of faculty? 
 
 
 
 The Institute currently has 27 regular faculty members, with more joining in July 2019. In addition , there are adjunct and visiting faculty members too. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Is hostel facility available? Are day-scholars allowed? 
 
 
 
 Yes, there are three Boys hostels and one Girls hostel. All programs offered by IIIT-NR are fully residential. It is mandatory for all students to stay on campus, even if the student is from the Naya Raipur region. Hostel facilities for 1025 students (785 boys & 240 girls) are currently available. 
 
 
 
 
 
 What is minimum cut-off for application to B.Tech. programs? 
 
 
 
 There is no minimum cut-off of JEE Main Merit rankings. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Will IIIT Naya Raipur admission happen through JoSAA? 
 
 
 
 Yes w.e.f from 2017. Kindly visit JoSAA website at institute code 420. Admission through JoSAA is for All India Quota ( 35% seats). 
 
 
 
 
 
 When will online applications for admission begin? 
 
 
 
 Refer to the schedule announced. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Can I apply under both All India quota and Chhattishgarh state quota? 
 
 
 
 Yes, through JoSAA in case of All India quota and through our web portal if you are eligible under Chhattishgarh state quota. 
 
 
 
 
 
 What is the best chance of getting a seat at IIIT-NR while choice filling in JoSAA portal? 
 
 
 
 Select the choice of programs available at IIIT-NR (Institute code 420) as first ,second and Third choices. 
 
 
 
 
 
 What is Admission under other categories? 
 
 
 
 Other categories mean admissions under a) 50 % seats under Chhattishgarh State Quota b) 15 % seats under NTPC quota. 
 
 
 
 
 
 How do I apply under State quota? 
 
 
 
 After initial login at our admission portal, you will be asked to fill the requisite form. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Is there any fee for application? If so, how to pay? 
 
 
 
 Yes, candidates have to pay Rs.500/- online through admission portal. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Can I fill choices without application fee? 
 
 
 
 No. You will be able fill in choices only after successful fee payment. 
 
 
 
 
 
 How should I order the choices of academic programs? 
 
 
 
 You must fill your choices of academic program in the DECREASING order of preferences. That is, your most preferred one should be on the top. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Will a candidate be allowed to reshuffle the choice list at any stage of seat allotment? 
 
 
 
 Candidates are allowed to reshuffle/reorder their choices ONLY during choice filling period before they “lock” their choices. Beyond that there is NO option of reordering. 
 
 
 
 
 
 What is locking of choices? Once locked, can I unlock? 
 
 
 
 Lock is an option indicating the finalization of choices. Choices will be automatically locked on the last date of application. 
 
 
 
 
 
 What is the period of choice filling? 
 
 
 
 Refer to the schedule announced. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Is there any cut off marks for registration and choice? 
 
 
 
 Yes, The eligibility for applying for the B.Tech program under Chhattisgarh quota at IIIT-NR is 50% aggregate marks in Physics and Mathematics (45% for SC/ST/OBC/PWD candidates) in their 12th standard examination. The eligibility for applying for the B.Tech program under All India category and NTPC quota is as per JoSAA guidelines. 
 
 
 
 
 
 How many rounds of seat allotment will happen? 
 
 
 
 
 Three rounds 
 
 
 
 
 
 What if seats remain vacant after three rounds? Will they be filled on quota or category basis?
 
 
 
 
 Seats remaining vacant at the end of three rounds of counseling, under any quota or reserved category shall be converted to All-India General(Open) and shall be available for admissions in the Spot Round.

title: Terms & Condition
content:
This website is designed, developed and maintained by the IT Department of IIIT-NR 
 
 Though all efforts have been made to ensure the accuracy and currency of the content on this website, the same should not be construed as a statement of law or used for any legal purposes. In case of any ambiguity or doubts, users are advised to verify/check with the IT Department  IIIT-NR and to obtain appropriate advice. 
 
 Under no circumstances will this Oragnisation be liable for any expense, loss or damage including, without limitation, indirect or consequential loss or damage, or any expense, loss or damage whatsoever arising from use, or loss of use, of data, arising out of or in connection with the use of this website. 
 
 These terms and conditions shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the Indian Laws. Any dispute arising under these terms and conditions shall be subject to the jurisdiction of the courts of India. 
 
 The information posted on this website could include hypertext links or pointers to information created and maintained by non-Government/private organisations. This Oragnisation is providing these links and pointers solely for your information and convenience. When you select a link to an outside website, you are leaving the IIIT-NR website and are subject to the privacy and security policies of the owners/sponsors of the outside website. This Oragnisation does not guarantee the availability of such linked pages at all times. 
 
 This Oragnisation cannot authorise the use of copyrighted materials contained in linked websites. Users are advised to request such authorisation from the owner of the linked website. 
 
 This Oragnisation does not guarantee that linked websites comply with Indian Government Web Guidelines.

title: Privacy Policy
content:
As a general rule, this website does not collect Personal Information about you when you visit the site. You can generally visit the site without revealing Personal Information, unless you choose to provide such information. 
 
 Site Visit Data 
 
 This website records your visit and logs the following information for statistical purposes -your server’s address; the name of the top-level domain from which you access the Internet (for example, .gov, .com, .in, etc.); the type of browser you use; the date and time you access the site; the pages you have accessed and the documents downloaded and the previous Internet address from which you linked directly to the site. 
 
 We will not identify users or their browsing activities, except when a law enforcement agency may exercise a warrant to inspect the service provider’s logs. 
 
 Cookies 
 
 A cookie is a piece of software code that an internet web site sends to your browser when you access information at that site. This site does not use cookies. 
 
 Email Management 
 
 Your email address will only be recorded if you choose to send a message. It will only be used for the purpose for which you have provided it and will not be added to a mailing list. Your email address will not be used for any other purpose, and will not be disclosed, without your consent. 
 
 Collection of Personal Information 
 
 If you are asked for any other Personal Information you will be informed how it will be used if you choose to give it. If at any time you believe the principles referred to in this privacy statement have not been followed, or have any other comments on these principles, please notify the webmaster through the contact us page. 
 
 Note: The use of the term “Personal Information” in this privacy statement refers to any information from which your identity is apparent or can be reasonably ascertained.

title: FAQs
content:
To which university and technical board the college is affiliated? 
 
 
 
 The institute is itself a state university established under the International institute of Information Technology University Act 2013. 
 
 
 
 
 
 When was the institutes established? 
 
 
 
 The act was passed in 2013. The first academic session shall commence from Aug 2015. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Which courses are run by IIIT-NR? 
 
 
 
 At present, there are two courses - 1. Computer Science 2. Electronics & Communication Engineering 
 
 
 
 
 
 What is the admission time for the various courses run by IIIT-NR? 
 
 
 
 The first session shall commence from Aug 2015. Dates for applying for admission shall be published on the website soon. 
 
 
 
 
 
 What is the admission criteria for various course run by IIIT-NR? 
 
 
 
 The adnmission shall be based on the JEE Main rank. In addition, the eligibility criteria is 50% in Physics and Mathematics (45 % for SC/ST students) 
 
 
 
 
 
 Are there any vacancies for faculty? 
 
 
 
 The vacancies for faculty shall be published on the website time to time. 
 
 
 
 
 
 What is code of conduct at IIIT-NR? 
 
 
 
 The rules shall be published on the website soon. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Is ragging prohibited in IIIT-NR? 
 
 
 
 Ragging of any kind is strictly prohibited in the institution. As per the directions of the Hon'ble Supreme Court of India, if any incident of ragging comes to the notice of the authorities, the concerned student will be given liberty to explain and if his explanation is not found satisfactory, he or she will be expelled from the institution. 
 
 
 
 
 
 How can I get information about admissions? 
 
 
 
 The information shall be published on the website. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Are there any scholarships available for students? 
 
 
 
 A corpus of Rs 18 crore has been allocated specifically for scholraships to the students. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Are there any seats reserved for female candidates? 
 
 
 
 The reservation details shall be published in the admission brochure. 
 
 
 
 
 
 What are the documents required to be submitted at the time of admission? 
 
 
 
 The details shall be avaailable on the website at the time of admission.

title: About IIIT-NR
content:
Highlights 
 
   
 
 
 
 Established as a University by the Govt. Of Chhattisgarh 
 
 Recognised by UGC 
 
 Letter Approval 2020-21 as Accorded by AICTE 
 
 Letter Approval 2021-22 as Accorded by AICTE 
 
 Letter Approval 2022-23 as Accorded by AICTE 
 
 Letter Approval 2023-24 as Accorded by AICTE 
 
 Letter Approval 2024-25 as Accorded by AICTE 
 
 Letter Approval 2025-26 as Accorded by AICTE 
 
 Guided by a highly eminent board 
 
 Located in the capital of Chhattisgarh with good connectivity 
 
 Fully residential campus with state-of-the art infrastructure  
 
 Industry driven curriculum with focus on fostering innovation and entrepreneurship among students 
 
 Focus on teaching, research and consultancy  
 
 Equipped with e-enabled teaching and learning facilities 
 
 Intensive Professional English Language Development Facility                               
 
 
 Dr. SPM IIIT-Naya Raipur, established by the International Institute of Information Technology University Act, 2013 of the Government of Chhattisgarh, is a joint venture by Chhattisgarh State Government and National Thermal Power Corporation (NTPC). The institute is committed to pursue excellence in higher education, research and development in Information Technology (IT) and associated disciplines. It firmly believes in bestowing knowledge dissemination and imparting entrepreneurial skills to the students to enable them to address real world problems. To empower this vision, IIIT-NR fosters state-of-the-art research and product development laboratories to carry out inter-disciplinary research and product development endeavours.The institute is mentored by a highly eminent board comprising of :-  
 
   
 
 Prof. Dhananjai Pandey, Hon. Distinguished Professor, BHU (for life) and Distinguished Professor, IIT Bhilai 
 Chairman 
 
 Prof. U B Desai , The Founding Director of IIT Hyderabad 
 Member 
 
 Mr. Sujit Baksi, President Corporate Affairs,Tech Mahindra 
 Member 
 
 A. Pinto, Retired Lead Director of the Chairman's Supervisory Board of the Emirates Investment Bank, UAE 
 Member 
 
 Principal Secretary, Technical Education Department 
 Member 
 
 Principal Secretary, Electronics & Information Technology Department, Government of Chhattisgarh 
 Member 
 
 Director, Directorate of Technical Education Chhattisgarh 
 Member 
 
 Regional Executive Director (Western Region-II) NTPC Limited 
 Member 
 
 Chief General Manager, NTPC’s Lara Super Thermal Power Project 
 Member 
 
 Head  Power Management Institute, NTPC 
 Member 
 
 Vice Chancellor & Director, Dr. SPM IIIT-NR 
 Member Secretary 
 
 Dr. SPM IIIT-NR's fifty-acres residential campus is located in the newly developed smart city of Atal Nagar, approximately 23 kms from the city of Raipur. The vibrant lush green campus of IIIT-NR is enabled with Wi-Fi connectivity, CCTV surveillance, hi tech security measures and excellent amenities for sports and other recreational activities. The modern architecture of the buildings and the serene environment of the campus fosters an ambience for the students for creativity and innovation. The classrooms are equipped with state-of-the art technologies for teaching and learning.

 To be a leading technology institute that produces high quality IT professionals and fosters technological innovation for social upliftment.

title: Board
content:
Dhananjai Pandey (Chairperson) 
 
 
 
 A Professor Dhananjai Pandey is an internationally renowned educator and researcher in the field of Materials Science and Technology. His professional career started in 1977 as a Faculty Member in BHU/IIT (BHU) and he retired as Professor (HAG) in 2017 but continued as Institute Professor for another five years. He is presently a Distinguished Professor of BHU (for life) and IIT Bhilai. 
 
 A widely travelled scientist, Prof. Pandey has delivered Invited talks/Keynote addresses/ Plenary lectures at very large number of International and National Conferences held within India and abroad. He has published over 200 research articles in journals of international repute, books and book-series with over 8000 citations (14 papers with over 100 citations) and an h-index of 49. He also holds several patents to his credit. He is a Fellow of all the three premier science academies of India (Indian National Science Academy, Indian Academy of Sciences, National Academy of Sciences of India) and a Fellow of the Asia Pacific Academy of Materials. He is a recipient of several awards/medals (INSA Young Scientist Medal, Materials Research Society of India Medal, MRSI Annual Prize and MRSI Distinguished Lectureship award, Homi Bhabha Fellowship Award, DAE Raja Ramanna Award, Pt Jubilee Award of Indian Science Congress, J C Bose National Fellowship award etc). He has
He was Coordinator (Head) of the School of Materials Science and Technology at IT,BHU, first Director in the transition phase and Dean (Faculty Affairs) of IIT BHU. Under his leadership, the School of Mater Sci & Tech emerged as an Internationally reputed Centre of research and teaching in advanced functional materials. As a Dean of Faculty Affairs, policy documents for Salary fixation, Faculty Recruitment and Promotion of deserving existing faculty members as per IIT norms were developed and successfully implemented. 
 
 
 Professor Pandey has been Member of various committees of DST, CSIR, DRDO, UGC, INSA, IASc as well as Member of Governing Body/Council and Executive Council of IIT (BHU), BHU and SU, IUAC etc. 
 
 Professor Pandey has been Vice President and President of the Indian Crystallographic Association and Vice President of the Materials Research Society of India and is currently President of the Neutron Scattering Society of India. 
 
 Professor Pandey has served as Co-editor of the leading International journals published by the International Union of Crystallography, Acta Crystallographica Section A and Journal of Applied Crystallography (first Indian), and Member of Editorial Boards of International journals (Phase Transitions, Materials Science Forum and Zeitscrift-fur-kristallographie) as well as Indian journals (Bulletin of Materials Science and Praman-a Physics Journal). He presently serves on the editorial advisory boards of Zeitscrift-fur-kristallographie and Bulletin of Materials Science. He has served on many important international bodies like Ewald Prize Committee (the highest award in crystallography) and Asia-Oceania Neutron Scattering Association (AONSA) Prize Committee, Commission on Aperiodic Crystals, Commission on Inorganic Materials and Minerals, Commission on Mathematical and Theoretical Crystallography (MaThCryst), Sub-Committee on Nomenclature for Phase Transitions of the International Union of Crystallography (IUCr). He also served as Chairman of the MaThCryst Commission of the IUCr, being only the third Indian to be elected as Chairman of any one of the IUCr Commissions over the last seven decades. He is a founding Member of EC of AONSA and continues to be its Member from India at present. 
 
 
 
 
 Sujit Baksi 
 
 
 
 Sujit Baksi is an accomplished business leader with over 30 years of experience in the IT industry. A stalwart in the areas of people management, operations management and corporate strategy, Mr. Baksi is President, Corporate Affairs, at Tech Mahindra. His track record includes being President - Global Operations, Customer Services and CEO, HCL Technologies (BPO Solutions and Services). 
 
 Mr. Baksi is a graduate of Presidency College, Kolkata and holds a Master's Degree in Personnel Management from XLRI, Jamshedpur. 
 
 
 
 
 Steven A. Pinto 
 
 
 
 Steven A. Pinto is a retired Lead Director on the Chairman's Supervisory Board of the Emirates Investment Bank, UAE. He is currently serving on the Boards of ACGL, a Tata Motors subsidiary, Easyaccess Finance, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Redington India, Adlabs Entertainment Limited and CRIF High Mark. In the year 2000, he was appointed CEO of Osool Finance Company and concurrently Head of Retail Banking at Mashreq Bank, Dubai. 
 
 He is an Economics Honors graduate with a Masters in Management from the University of Mumbai. 
 
 
 
 
 Uday B. Desai 
 
 
 
 The Founding Director of IIT Hyderabad from June 2009 to June 2019, Professor Uday B. Desai has mentored the establishment and growth of several new premier technical institutes of the nation, including IIT Bhilai, IIIT Chittoor, Sri City, etc. At present he is Prof. Emeritus, IIT Hyderabad, Honorary Professor Woosong University, South Korea, and the Chancellor of Anurag University, Hyderabad. He also serves as a Strategic Consultant for TSDSI (Telecom Standards Development Society of India), a Senior Advisor at Talent Sprint, and an Academic Consultant for Plaksha University, Punjab, India. 
 
 Prof. Desai’s academic and research experience spans over four decades in top Indian and foreign technical institutes. From 1979 to 1984 he was an Assistant Professor in the School of Electrical Engineering and Computer Science at Washington State University, Pullman, WA, U.S.A., and an Associate Professor at the same place from 1984 to 1987. From 1987 to May 2009 he was a Professor at IIT Bombay. He has held visiting Associate Professor Positions at Arizona State University, Purdue University, and Stanford University, U.S.A. He was a visiting Professor at EPFL (a University based in Lausanne, Switzerland) during the summer of 2002. From July 2002 to June 2004 he was the Director of HP-IITM R&D Lab. His research interests are in wireless communication, wireless sensor networks, cyber physical systems, Internet of Things and Artificial Intelligence. 
 
 Prof. Desai has several national and international awards to his credit. He received the outstanding Alumni Award from University of Buffalo (State University of New York) in 2015, and the Distinguished Alumni Award from IIT Kanpur in 2016. He is a Fellow of INSA (Indian National Science Academy), Fellow of Indian National Academy of Engineering (INAE), and a Fellow of The Institution of Electronic & Telecommunication Engineers (IETE). He is the recipient of J C Bose Fellowship. He is also the recipient of the Excellence in Teaching Award from IIT-Bombay for 2007. He is on the Board of Tata Communications Limited, and the Hyderabad Eye Research Foundation Board of LV Prasad Eye Institute. He was on the Strategy Advisory Board of Microsoft Research Lab. India. He is a member of many Central Government Committees and several Governing Councils of leading academic institutions. He Chairs several committees under MEITY (Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology, India), DST (Department of Science and Technology, India), DRDO (Defense Research and Development Organization, India), and various private organizations. He is one of the founding members of COMSNETS (a premier international conference dedicated to advances in Networking and Communications Systems), and also Society for Cancer Research and Communication. He was the Chair for IEEE Bombay Section during 2006-2008. He was also on the Visitation Panel for University of Ghana. 
 
 Prof. Uday B. Desai received his B. Tech. degree from Indian Institute of Technology, Kanpur, India, in 1974, the M.S. degree from the State University of New York, Buffalo, in 1976, and the Ph.D. degree from The Johns Hopkins University, Baltimore, U.S.A., in 1979. 

Prof. Desai continues to offer his services in various capacities to many technical institutes and research organizations towards his passion for nation building.
 
 
 
 
 Ankit Anand 
 
 
 
 Shri Ankit Anand is an officer of the Indian Administrative Service (IAS) belonging to the Batch of 2006 borne on Chhattisgarh Cadre. He did his B. Tech (Computer Science & Engineering) from Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Kanpur. After joining the IAS, he has held several charges such as Assistant Collector Dantewada; Sub-Divisional Officer (C) Dantewada; Chief Executive Officer, Zila Panchayat, Kanker & Raipur; Collector, Jashpur, Bastar & Durg District; Chief Executive Officer, CREDA (Chhattisgarh State Renewable Energy Development Agency); Managing Director, Chhattisgarh State Power Distribution Company Limited (CSPDCL); CEO, Nava Raipur Atal Nagar Vikash Pradhikaran; Managing Director, Chhattisgarh State Marketing Federation (Markfed); Special Secretary (IC), Govt. of Chhattisgarh, Housing & Environment Department; Secretary, Govt. of C.G., Energy Department & Chairman, Chhattisgarh Power Company; Secretary to Hon'ble Chief Minister; Secretary, Govt. of C.G., Finance, Planning Economics & Statistics Department; Secretary, Govt. of C.G., Commerce & Industries Department; Secretary, Planning, Economics & Statistics Department 
 
 At Present he is Secretary, Govt. of C.G., Housing & Environment, Information & Technology, Commercial Tax (Registration); Chairman, Chhattisgarh Environment Conservation Board; and Chairman, Nava Raipur Atal Nagar Vikash Pradhikaran 
 
 
 
 
 Solai Bharathi Dasan 
 
 
 
 Dr. Solai Bharathi Dasan is an Indian Administrative Service (IAS) officer of 2006 batch and is currently the Secretary, D/o Skill Development, Technical Education & Employment, Government of Chhattisgarh. He has a Doctorate degree in Agriculture. After joining IAS, he has served in several key administrative positions like Collector Surajpur; Collector Janjgir-Champa; Additional CEO (Elections); Managing Director (Civil Supplies / Consumer Affairs, Food & PD); Managing Director (Agricultural Marketing / Agriculture & Cooperation); Collector & District Magistrate, Raipur etc. 
 
 
 
 
 Vijay Dayaram K 
 
 
 
 Shri Vijay Dayaram K. is an Indian Administrative Officer of 2015 batch and is currently the Director, Technical Education, Employment and Training, Government of Chhattisgarh. Prior to this he has handled important portfolios like MD National Health Mission, Collector Bastar, Collector Balrampur, Commissioner Ambikapur Nagar Nigam, Kawardha District Panchayat CEO, Dhamtari District Panchayat CEO, Additional Collector Bilaspur, SDM Wadrafnagar, SDM Ramanujganj, and Assistant Collector of Rajnandgoan district. 
 
 
 
 
 Neeraj Jalota 
 
 
 
 Shri Neeraj Jalota is a senior power sector professional with over 37 years of distinguished experience encompassing project development, operations, maintenance, and coal mining. He holds an M.Tech in Industrial Engineering from IIT Delhi and a Post Graduate Diploma in Business Management from MDI Gurgaon, reflecting a strong blend of technical depth and managerial leadership. 
 
 Currently, Shri Jalota serves as the Executive Director, Unified Shared Services Centre (USSC), an integrated single-window platform responsible for materials procurement and contract management for NTPC stations nationwide. In this role, he has played a pivotal part in driving process standardization, operational efficiency, and enterprise-wide integration of shared services.
In addition, he holds the responsibility of Regional Executive Director (WR-II), as the administrative head of five major thermal power stations located at Korba, Sipat, and Lara in Chhattisgarh, and Gadarwara and Khargone in Madhya Pradesh. His mandate encompasses oversight of Operations and Maintenance activities for an aggregate operating capacity of 10,100 MW, as well as strategic supervision of ongoing capacity expansion projects totaling 4,000 MW, including 1,600 MW each at Lara and Gadarwara, and 800 MW at Sipat.
 
 
 Prior to his current roles, Shri Jalota served as Chief Executive Officer of the Jhabua Thermal Power Plant, where he successfully transformed the captive power plant into a profitable operation, strengthened environmental compliance, and enhanced overall operational performance.
He has undergone several in-house and overseas training programmes in technical, managerial, and mining domains. Shri Jalota’s vast leadership experience, institutional perspective, and strategic insight contribute meaningfully to governance and capacity-building initiatives.
 
 
 
 
 
 Subhash Thakur 
 
 
 
 
Shri Subhash Thakur, General Manager is the Head of Project of NTPC Limited, Lara Super Thermal Power Station, located at Raigarh District of Chhattisgarh. He brings with him 32 years of experience and an expertise in the power sector, with dexterity in diversified fields. 
 
 In his exemplary career, he has performed multi-dimensional roles in the field of Power Generation, including Operation & Maintenance, Project Engineering, Centre for Power Efficiency & Environmental Protection in projects/stations of NTPC located at Rihand, CC-EOC, Darlipali, Koldam Hydro project and Lara. He has rendered his remarkable finesse in the Operation & Maintenance of various power projects spread across all parts of India. Before coming to Lara he was Head of Project of NTPC - Koldam. 
 
 Shri Subhash Thakur is firmly committed to his responsibility towards constantly striving to set new benchmarks of efficiency and Operation Management of the power stations. With benevolence at heart, Shri Subhash Thakur is philanthropic and is actively involved in various social welfare activities as well. 
 
 
 
 
 Rachana Singh Bhal 
 
 
 
 
Ms Rachana Singh Bhal is an HR professional having 34 years of work experience in NTPC, the leading power producer in India and one of the best employers. 
 
 She is an Electronics and Instrumentation Engineer with an MBA degree. 
 
 Her experience includes Corporate Engineering, Plant Maintenance and various functions in HR domain. She has been Head of HR in various projects of NTPC. She is currently heading the Power Management Institute, the apex Learning and Development Centre of NTPC. 
 
 
 
 
 Om Prakash Vyas Member Secretary 
 
 
 
 Prof. O.P. Vyas has recently been appointed as the Director of Dr. Shyama Prasad Mukherjee International Institute of Information Technology (IIIT), Naya Raipur. He is a senior academician, researcher, and institutional leader with over three decades of rich experience in higher technical education, research, and academic administration. 
 
 Prof. Vyas holds an M.Tech. in Computer Science from IIT Kharagpur, and pursued his Ph.D. research at TU Kaiserslautern, Germany, under the prestigious DAAD Fellowship program. He has contributed significantly during his tenure as Dean of Technology Development, Professor of Information Technology at IIIT Allahabad, where he played a key role in academic innovation, including the conceptualization and launch of the B.Tech. (IT–Business Informatics) program. 
 
 His areas of specialization include Data Science, Process Intelligence, Business Informatics, Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) and Cyber Security. He has successfully led several national and international collaborative research projects, and served as Visiting Professor in countries such as France, Germany, Italy, Norway, and Japan. 
 
 Known for his academic vision, dedication to student-centric learning, and strategic leadership, Prof. Vyas aims to elevate IIIT Naya Raipur as a premier hub of technology, innovation, and multidisciplinary education aligned with the goals of India’s National Education Policy (NEP) 2020., while also contributing meaningfully to the state's technological growth. 
 
 A native of Raipur, Chhattisgarh, Prof. Vyas is widely regarded as a pioneer of IT education in the region. As the Founding Head of the Department of Computer Science at Pt. Ravishankar Shukla University, Raipur, he introduced the region’s first formal academic program in Computer Science in 1992. This landmark initiative laid the groundwork for the expansion of IT education across Chhattisgarh. Committed to inclusive growth, Prof. Vyas worked tirelessly to extend the reach of IT education to rural and remote areas of the state, bridging the digital divide and empowering underserved communities

title: Ecosystem Partners
content:
Collaborations and ecosystems play a vital role in defining tomorrow as technology and our day-to-day lives become interconnected. To fully explore application potential and reap benefits of knowledge, partners who bring in different perspectives, diverse needs and need custom solutions are imperative. 
 
 Understanding the need for such active innovation ecosystems, IIITNR will be the hub of such energy. Partnering with other academic institutions, industry, Government and the community at-large are key aspects of the vision of IIITNR to foster a spirit of applied research and entrepreneurship. The Institute will also be launching its Centre of Innovation and Incubation, shortly, to stimulate the spirit within and outside the Institute.

title: Industry
content:
﻿ 
 
 IIIT-NR has been established with seed support of NTPC and will actively work with NTPC to develop custom solutions for their needs.Discussions with R&D teams at NTPC to understand their needs and effort to engage faculty, students of IIIT-NR in addressing those needs are moving at a swift pace. 
 
 IIIT-NR will leverage its experience in working with NTPC to forge more such partnerships with PSUs and private industry in the country going forward.

title: Government
content:
﻿ 
 Atal Nagar is gearing up to be the first Smart City in the country with excellent infrastructure already in place. IIITNR is ideally poised to become the invention hub and test bed for technologies that will enable Smart Cities in the country. IIITNR is actively seeking collaboration with the Atal Nagar Vikas Pradhikaran Authority (ANVP) to aid in the growth of the city.

 
 The Government of Chhattisgarh is also looking forward to utilizing the expertise of faculty members of IIITNR in various digitization projects within the State.

title: Academics
content:
﻿ 
 
 IIIT Bangalore has kindly agreed to mentor IIITNR. This relationship will not only provide IIIT-NR access to the best faculty of IIITB, but will also help in learning how best to interface with industry towards encouraging demand-driven innovation. 
 
 Naya Raipur is home to prestigious institutions such as the Indian Institute of Management, the National Institute of Technology, the All India Institute of Medical Sciences, the Hidayatullah National Law University, and the Indian Institute of Technology. IIIT-NR has been actively engaging with these Institutions to collaborate and establish forums for exchange of knowledge, faculty, students towards applied research and promotion of entrepreneurship in the region. Specifics of such efforts to be launched will be announced shortly.

title: IT Infrastructure
content:
IIIT-NR has truly world class, campus-wide state of the art information technology tools that are designed to meet the computing and communication needs of the institute, which has a fast, reliable and rugged computer network of more than 700 Nodes. In order to facilitate proper teaching aid, all classrooms here are equipped with projectors and audio systems and has two smart classrooms. All the hostels, cafeteria, academic block, guest house, multipurpose hall and residences, are connected through redundant 10 gigabit fiber backbone network. All the blocks are connected through layer 2 & 3 switches to provide 1Gbps connectivity at the user end. Wireless network with 84 indoor access points  to give total campus Wi-Fi coverage. All traffic for internet both inbound and outbound passes though 1+1 redundant UTM. 
 
 Internet Access : Through a 500 Mbps Internet leased line ( In ring Arctiticture), 1Gbps ( In ring Arctiticture) and  100 Mbps from NKN   with an  active–active configuration.   Internet connection range is provided through both LAN and Wi-Fi in all blocks inclusive of residences, academic, dinning and hostels. 
 
                                      Our team 
 
 
 
 ABIR BHATTACHARYA 
 
 
 SENIOR NETWORK ENGINEER 
 Where To Find:- 131C 
 Email:- abir@iiitnr.edu.in   
 Phone:771-2474010 
 
 
 
 
 
 PARVINDER SINGH 
 
 
 NETWORK ENGINEER 
 Where to find:- 131E 
 Email: -parvinder@iiitnr.edu.in   
 Phone:771-2474034 
 
 
 
 
 
 LALIT MARKANDEY 
 
 
 LABORATORY ASSISTANT 
 Email:- lalit@iiitnr.edu.in   
 
 
 
 Data Centre : IIIT-NR has a full-fledged data center of its own. It hosts 5 half blade form factor Inten XEON servers in a 16 slot chassis and has network unified storage of 35 TB. The datacentre is powered by redundant 100KVA UPS with N+1 backup.  All servers are connected to Internet by public IPs. 
 
 Virtual machines on cloud: -   The Institute has VMware Venter cluster perpetual licenses. VM cluster is formed with 1 Physical server failover configuration with total computation power of 80 CPU cores and 1TB of RAM.  All logical servers are created on top VM hypervisor which is managed by Venter server, this setup is a private cloud setup for IIIT-NR usage. Date of all virtual machines are kept at SAN and are backed up weekly using VMware EMC backup system.Institute also uses open source  ProxMox Hypervisor in cluster for one Xeon server dedicated for under grad students project. 
 
 Infrastructure Servers: - IT infrastructure uses servers for providing various important services to the institute. The servers are primarily all open source Linux based system. Severs like webserver, mail server, DHCP server, Active directory and internal DNS server. Public DNS server, helpdesk server, Library server, Moodle server, Oracle database server, and many more license server used for infrastructure of the institute. All the servers are created on VM cluster as mentioned above. 
 
 Compute Server: - IT Department issues server infrastructure to students, faculty members to cater their computational needs on requirement basis. This is also issued from the VM cluster as mentioned above. Currently 2 computational servers have been issued to students and faculty to carry our research and project work. Apart for that One server with open source ProxMox Hypervisor in  dedicated for Under grad students project. 
 
 IP Telephony : Our entire Campus is equipped with IP telephony. It has 75 IP phones.   
 
 Video Conferencing : Polycom Real presence HD   VC System is available with multi party conference facility.  
 
 VPN : It can be used to access all IIIT-NR IT resources from outside campus using any Internet connection. 
 
 Software : Institute holds licenses on various software like Cisco WebEx,  VMware, Microsoft Office, Synopsys , Cadence , Ansys, Matlab , Netsim, Oracle, Wordsworth, CST etc. These are used by students, staff and faculty members. LabView,  Simulink, Orcad 
 
 
 
 
 
   
   
   
 
 Operating Systems and Services:-  The institute mainly focuses on usage of free operating system like Ubuntu etc. But keeping in view of long term requirements, the institute also has licenses for Microsoft Windows MSDN dreams park account to upgrade/install their Microsoft products. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Desktop clients:-   The institute has 500desktops, 40 workstations at various labs and offices, 45 laptops and 70 printers and scanners. For labs institute has one server, 35 TB  Network unified storage dedicated for high end computing 
 
 
 
 Eclassroom :-   Institute has  two 120 sitters E-Classrooms. Equipped for two way (remote and IIIT-NR) interactive lectures. In this setup  16 simultaneous classrooms can be connected. Live streaming and recoding of lectures are being done using the Eclassroom Facility.

title: IIIT-NR CONNECT MOBILE APPLICATION
content:
About The App:- 
 
 IIIT Connect (Version 2.0) launched on 11th August 2016 by Rohit Kumar Singh and Arijit Saha 
 
 Currently Only Available on Android Devices. 
 
 
 Specifications of the App:- 
 
 1. Book Bazzar:-It is the online e-commerce app based portal where old engineering books are sold to the new students at a rate which is decided very low. 
 
 2. Notifications:-You will get immediate notifications of the upcoming events like tests, submission of assignments and different events going to happen in the campus. 
 
 3. Events/Happening:-It lists down both the Upcoming events and the Latest events in details of IIIT Naya Raipur. 
 
 4. Photo Gallery:- It makes you relive a moment by showing you the photographs of different events of IIITNR. 
 
 5. Important Documents/Notices:-It displays the important notices like Academic Calendar, Mess Menu, Examination Schedues, Time Table. 
 
 6. Student Of the Month:- The most interesting feature of IIIT Connect. Here both students and faculty members can vote their favourite student using their unique Verification Code. 
 
 7. Student Contact:- It displays the details of all students of IIITNR including their Contact Numbers, Email ID, Branch, Room No's. 
 
 8. Societies and Clubs:- Here anyone can find the various societies of IIIT NR and also check out their official websites and join them also. 
 
 
 Directions of Installing The App:- 
 
 Install the "IIIT Connect" from Google Play from the following link:- 
 
 https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=abc.iiitnr 
 
 
 Connect with us:- 
 
 Drop us an email at connectiiit@gmail.com 
 
 Join AppetIIIT at https://goo.gl/forms/fv4m3X8STEBR63vM 
 
 Check out our Facebook page https://www.facebook.com/appetiiit/ 
 
 Check our Youtube Channel https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCEdri7kmhRPwMIjxLZGMOQQ 
 
   
 
 Screenshots:-

title: Anti Ragging Committee
content:
In compliance with the decisions of Hon’ble Supreme Court of India and consequent Gazette notification of “University Grant Commission Regulations 2013” for curbing the Menace of Ragging in Higher Educational Institutions and also as notified by AICTE vide its notification no. 37-3/Legal/AICTE/2009 dated 25-03-2009, the competent authority has constituted following Committees as part of Anti ragging measures in IIITNR campus; 
 
 Institute Level Anti-Ragging Committee 
 
 VC & Director - Chair 
 
 Dean (Academics) - Member 
 
 Chairman (HMC)- Member 
 
 SAC President - Member 
 
 Dr. Sresha Yadav nee Ghosh - Member 
 
 Representative of parents (fresher, Senior) 
 
 Student representatives (fresher, Senior) 
 
 Registrar - Member Secretary 
 
 Anti Ragging Flying squads: 
 
 The proposed Anti-Ragging Squads shall be empowered to inspect all such places which are vulnerable to incidents of ragging and shall ensure vigil in all such locations. Hostel Level Squad shall also be empowered to inspect all places in the Hostel which are vulnerable to incidents of ragging and shall ensure vigil in all such locations. The Hostel Level Anti-Ragging Squad shall publish the contact information (including Mobile numbers) of it’s members as follows; 
 
 Anti Ragging Squad (Boys Hostel): 
 
  Dr. Anurag Singh - Chair 
 
 Warden and Assistant Warden- Ramanujan House Member 
 
 Warden and Assistant Warden - Raman House Member  
 
 PG/Ph.D. Program Student Representative-Member 
 
 B.Tech. 3rd Year Student Representative - Member  
 
 B.Tech. 2nd Year Student Representative - Member 
 
 Member Secretary - Dr. Lakhinder Murmu 
 
 Anti Ragging Squad (Girls Hostel): 
 
 Dr. Deepika Gupta - Chair 
 
 Wardens and Assistant Wardens- Girl Hostels  
 
 PG/Ph.D. Program Student Representative-Member  
 
 B.Tech. 3rd Year Student Representative - Member  
 
 B.Tech. 2nd Year Student Representative - Member 
 
 Member Secretary - Dr. Vijaya J.

title: STUDENTS SPEAK
content:
Leaving the comfort of home and stepping into college for further studies can be an amazing experience if you are wishing to pursue your engineering studies from IIIT Naya Raipur. With      exciting fests, events, workshops, along with supportive seniors and freindly professors, IIIT-NR campus is a fantastic place to spend four years of your life…….. Prachi Priyam, B.Tech  (CSE) Student 
  Focussing on academic front, programs like SYMPOSIUM 2k16 on Bussiness Intelligence and Big Data Analytics gave the students a wide exposure to Big Data World. DARPAN 2k16, a self-introspection workshop has taken an initiative in inculcating self-confidence, self-awareness and solid foundations of knowledge. These programs have been successful  in reflecting innovation and creativity among students…… Bahroz Hassan, B.Tech. (ECE) Student 
 
 It gives me immense satisfaction to have completed an exciting first year at IIIT-NR. The journey has been a remarkable one. I made new friends at IIIT-NR. Also we (Our Director, Faculty and Students) regard ourselves as a member of a family- “The IIIT-NR Family”. The Professors here are highly knowledgeable and experienced in their respective fields. IIIT-NR gives a great opportunity for students to broaden their knowledge beyond their field of studies within a multicultural environment.  The institute has hi-tech and robust infrastructure and associated facilities like Hi-Speed Internet Access, Library and others. It is a moment of extreme happiness and immense responsibility to maintain the reputation of this epic family of which I am proud to be a part of……………… Siddhant Dash, B.Tech. (ECE) Student 
 
   My ambition is not only to complete my degree successfully, but to make the best out of the time spent studying. The IIIT-NR teaching staff are very supportive and amongst the best in their genre. You can count on them to inspire you to bring out the best in yourself and even the most difficult and intricate topics will be taught with the utmost professionalism. IIIT-NR is equipped with smart classrooms, fully-furnished labs and library. The Institute offers an ideal environment for education and research. IIIT-NR has been truly a world class institute.……. Prashant Dhillon, B.Tech. (ECE) Student 
  If you are looking for world class education in the field of Information Technology, you are at the right place. At IIIT-NR, a student flourishes personally as well as professionally. The institute is currently focussing on quality education to each student so that one can enhance themselves not only as an engineer, but also as an entrepreneur. IIIT-NR harbours a healthy campus culture with lively environment. Here, the Hostel life is the best part of students’ life which certainly helps in coming out as a strong and independent person……. Pooja Jaiswal, B.Tech. (CSE) Student 
                                                                                                            Since the first moment I came to IIIT-NR, I was met with nothing but energy and enthusiasm.  The faculty and staff at this institution are top rate.  They all want their students to do well.  This institution has so many opportunities for the students to get the help they need and they deserve. It is a privilege to be a part of this institution…………… Gaurav Gupta, B.Tech. (ECE) Student 
  It is a pleasing experience to be part of IIIT-NR, where I am able to nurture my dreams and turn them into reality. It provides a platform where students can learn, experience and sharpen their skills…….. Ajeet Singh, B.Tech. (ECE) Student 
  I am a B.Tech. CSE student of IIIT-NR. Till now, I have cherished every moment of my stay in the campus. IIIT-NR is a spellbound mixture of fun and studies. Cirriculum of the university is very good and can be compared with any of the other premier institutes…… Aman Varma, B.Tech. (CSE) Student 
  IIIT-NR, a place where knowledge blooms and education blossoms. Benevolent professors and ever ready staff make the scope for better education. An ideal institute for the engineering aspirants who seek to pursue their career in technology. Campus life of IIIT-NR brings out creativity and innovation among students encouraging them to build their own way to success."Seek and ye shall find"…….. Ananya Srivastava, B.Tech. (ECE) Student 
  The deep faith in the dictum "One's own reaction to, observations about and understanding of something are more important than someone else's opinion about it", became the cornerstone of IIIT-NR, and this cherished conviction inspired and guided me to spread my wings to fly. IIIT-NR educates students in a creative way and encourages us to think out of the box. However, the institute not only helps me to excel in the academic field, but also teaches me a lot about different cultures and how to appreciate them. The good learning environment, excellent teachers, labs, library and infrastructure at IIIT-NR, helps a student to acquire knowledge vividly…. Aditi, B.Tech. (ECE) Student   
  IIIT-NR has provided a great platform for all the students to explore themselves –personally and professionally. The environment is friendly and inviting, the faculty and supporting staff would do anything for you to be the best that you can be while here, and you learn more than just what is being taught in the classroom. IIIT-NR is where people are motivated to acquire knowledge and engage the world around them . …. Hansa Meghwani, B.Tech. (CSE) Student 
  IIIT-NR's multicultural campus helps in creating an environment of knowledge and skill sharing. The vibrant nature of the campus has brought out the creativity, innovation and mutual understanding among the students …. Twinkle Singh, B.Tech. (ECE) Student 
  
  The peaceful atmosphere of the campus is exemplary for the academic and the residential life. With the faculty members also staying in the residential campus, the students are always in touch with them and there is always a presence of educational environment in the campus. The Infrastructure of the campus gives special impetus to the cultural, athletic and educational activities, the campus of IIIT-NR just feels like a different learning medium, thus providing umpteen opportunities for the growth and development of the student in various disciplines. The best way to get a notion of the campus is to join the IIIT-NR family and create your own experience…. Yash Aavart Pathak, B.Tech. (ECE) Student
