title: FAQs
content:
To which university and technical board the Institute is affiliated? 
 
 
 
 The Institute in itself is a State University established by the Government of Chhattisgarh and recognized by UGC. 
 
 
 
 
 
 When was the institute established? 
 
 
 
 The first academic session of the institute commenced from Aug 2015 in its own campus. 
 
 
 
 
 
 What are the programs offered? 
 
 
 
 The Institute currently offers the following programs:- 
 
 a) 4 Years B.Tech. in (ECE) 
 
 b)4 Years B.Tech. in (CSE) 
 
 c)4 Years B.Tech. in (DSAI) 
 
 d)2 Years M.Tech. in (CSE) 
 
 e)2 Years M.Tech. in (ECE) 
 
 f) Ph.D. in (ECE) 
 
 g) Ph.D. in (CSE) 
 
 h) Ph.D. in (Physics) 
 
 i) Ph.D. in (Mathematics) 
 
 j) Ph.D. in (English) 
 
 k) Ph.D. in (Management) 
 
 
 
 
 
 When does admission for B.Tech programs begin? 
 
 
 
 The admission to B.Tech programs begins in May-June. 
 
 
 
 
 
 What is the admission criteria for B.Tech. programs? 
 
 
 
 Admission to the undergraduate program of the DSPM IIIT-NR is based strictly on the merit of the candidate as inferred from their performance in JEE (Joint Entrance Examination). The minimum eligibility for applying for the B.Tech program under Chhattisgarh quota at IIIT-NR is 50% aggregate marks in Physics and Mathematics (45% for SC/ST/OBC/PWD candidates) in their 12th standard examination. The eligibility for applying for the B.Tech program under All India category and NTPC quota is as per JoSAA guidelines. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Is Ph.D. offered at IIIT-NR? 
 
 
 
 Yes.  Please visit Admission section at our website for further details. 
 
 
 
 
 
 When does admission for Ph.D. programs begin? 
 
 
 
 The admission for Ph.D. programs usually takes place at the beginning of each semester (i.e June for Autumn semester and December for Spring semester) 
 
 
 
 
 
 Is ragging prohibited in IIIT-NR? 
 
 
 
 Ragging of any kind is strictly prohibited in the Institution. As per the directions of the Hon'ble Supreme Court of India, if any incident of ragging comes to the notice of the authorities, the concerned student will be given liberty to explain and if his explanation is not found satisfactory, he or she will be expelled from the Institution. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Are there any scholarships available for B.Tech students? 
 
 
 
	Financial aid to the needy students is under active consideration of the Govt. Of Chhattisgarh. Any student entitled for financial aid as approved by the Govt. will get back to the refund from already paid fees.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Are there any seats reserved for female candidates? 
 
 
 
 For admission to its programs under CG Quota , the institute follows the Chhattisgarh State Government policy on reservation of 30% to Women. However , for admission under All India Quota & NTPC , Government of India policy on reservation applies. 
 
 
 
 
 
 What are the documents required to be submitted at the time of admission? 
 
 
 
 Please follow instructions available on the website  as part of the application process. 
 
 
 
 
 
 How many students will be admitted to B.Tech. program ? 
 
 
 
 Please see the Admission Brochure. 
 
 
 
 
 
 What is the strength of faculty? 
 
 
 
 The Institute currently has 27 regular faculty members, with more joining in July 2019. In addition , there are adjunct and visiting faculty members too. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Is hostel facility available? Are day-scholars allowed? 
 
 
 
 Yes, there are three Boys hostels and one Girls hostel. All programs offered by IIIT-NR are fully residential. It is mandatory for all students to stay on campus, even if the student is from the Naya Raipur region. Hostel facilities for 1025 students (785 boys & 240 girls) are currently available. 
 
 
 
 
 
 What is minimum cut-off for application to B.Tech. programs? 
 
 
 
 There is no minimum cut-off of JEE Main Merit rankings. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Will IIIT Naya Raipur admission happen through JoSAA? 
 
 
 
 Yes w.e.f from 2017. Kindly visit JoSAA website at institute code 420. Admission through JoSAA is for All India Quota ( 35% seats). 
 
 
 
 
 
 When will online applications for admission begin? 
 
 
 
 Refer to the schedule announced. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Can I apply under both All India quota and Chhattishgarh state quota? 
 
 
 
 Yes, through JoSAA in case of All India quota and through our web portal if you are eligible under Chhattishgarh state quota. 
 
 
 
 
 
 What is the best chance of getting a seat at IIIT-NR while choice filling in JoSAA portal? 
 
 
 
 Select the choice of programs available at IIIT-NR (Institute code 420) as first ,second and Third choices. 
 
 
 
 
 
 What is Admission under other categories? 
 
 
 
 Other categories mean admissions under a) 50 % seats under Chhattishgarh State Quota b) 15 % seats under NTPC quota. 
 
 
 
 
 
 How do I apply under State quota? 
 
 
 
 After initial login at our admission portal, you will be asked to fill the requisite form. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Is there any fee for application? If so, how to pay? 
 
 
 
 Yes, candidates have to pay Rs.500/- online through admission portal. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Can I fill choices without application fee? 
 
 
 
 No. You will be able fill in choices only after successful fee payment. 
 
 
 
 
 
 How should I order the choices of academic programs? 
 
 
 
 You must fill your choices of academic program in the DECREASING order of preferences. That is, your most preferred one should be on the top. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Will a candidate be allowed to reshuffle the choice list at any stage of seat allotment? 
 
 
 
 Candidates are allowed to reshuffle/reorder their choices ONLY during choice filling period before they “lock” their choices. Beyond that there is NO option of reordering. 
 
 
 
 
 
 What is locking of choices? Once locked, can I unlock? 
 
 
 
 Lock is an option indicating the finalization of choices. Choices will be automatically locked on the last date of application. 
 
 
 
 
 
 What is the period of choice filling? 
 
 
 
 Refer to the schedule announced. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Is there any cut off marks for registration and choice? 
 
 
 
 Yes, The eligibility for applying for the B.Tech program under Chhattisgarh quota at IIIT-NR is 50% aggregate marks in Physics and Mathematics (45% for SC/ST/OBC/PWD candidates) in their 12th standard examination. The eligibility for applying for the B.Tech program under All India category and NTPC quota is as per JoSAA guidelines. 
 
 
 
 
 
 How many rounds of seat allotment will happen? 
 
 
 
 
 Three rounds 
 
 
 
 
 
 What if seats remain vacant after three rounds? Will they be filled on quota or category basis?
 
 
 
 
 Seats remaining vacant at the end of three rounds of counseling, under any quota or reserved category shall be converted to All-India General(Open) and shall be available for admissions in the Spot Round.

title: Convocation Notifications and Instructions
content:
Convocation Notification 
 
 Important Instructions:-  
 
 Convocation will be in physical Mode only, a maximum of 02 guests/ accompany of the degree recipients will be allowed. 
 
 It is mandatory for all degree recipients to attend rehearsal on 23 April 2023. 
 
 Please enter the Convocation Venue with the proper dress code as prescribed and occupy the seat allotted to you 30 minutes before starting time. The dress codes are to be strictly followed failing which you may not be allowed to receive the degree on the dais 
 
 . 
 
  Important Dates:-  
 
   
 
  Closing of registrations 16th April 2023   11:59 pm 
 
  Rehearsal: 23 April 2023   5:00 pm 
 
 3rd Convocation 24 April 2023 11:00 am

title: Abhishek Sharma
content:
Designation: (ASSISTANT PROFESSOR, ECE) 
 
 Qualification: Ph. D. (IIT Guwahati) 
 
 Department: ECE 
 
 Email Id: abhishek[at]iiitnr.edu.in 
 
 Contact No: 91-771-2474031 
 
 
 
 
 Brief Profile : 
 
 Dr. Abhishek Sharma is an Assistant Professor in the Electronics and Communication Engineering discipline. Prior to joining IIIT-NR, he was an Assistant Professor, in Jabalpur Engineering College, Jabalpur for more than one year. Dr. Sharma has received his Ph.D. in Signal Processing from IIT Guwahati, M.Tech. in Radio Frequency Design and Technology from IIT Delhi and B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering from Government Engineering College Raipur. He was recipient of scholarship provided by the Governor of Chhattisgarh 
Dr. Sharma has published several articles in journals and conference proceedings of international repute.   
 
 
 
 
 
 Research Interest 
 
 
 Bio-metrics, Online Signature Verification, Write identification, Image Processing, Pattern Recognition and Machine Learning. 
 
 
 
 
 Professional Activities 
 
 
 
 
 one year experience as Assistant Professor at Jabalpur Engineering College Jabalpur. (05.01.2018 to 15.03.2019) 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Awards And Accolades 
 
 
 
 
 Recipient of Scholarship worth Graduation fee from the then Chhattisgarh Governor K. M. Seth   
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Research Supervision 
 
 
 
 
 
 
  
 
 
 
 
 Selected Publications 
 
 
 
 Publication in Journals: 
 
 
 C. Sekhar Vorugunti, V. Pulabaigari, P. Mukherjee and Abhishek Sharma, "DeepFuseOSV: online signature verification using hybrid feature fusion and depth wise separable convolution neural network architecture," in IET Biometrics, vol. 9, no. 6, pp. 259-268, Nov. 2020, doi: 10.1049/iet-bmt.2020.0032.

title: Amit Kumar Agrawal
content:
Designation: (ASSOCIATE PROFESSOR ,MANAGEMENT) 
 
 Qualification: Ph.D. (IIT Roorkee) 
 
 Department: SHM 
 
 Web Url: https://scholar.google.co.in/citations?user=iOiVmzEAAAAJ&hl=en 
 
 Email Id: amitag[at]iiitnr.edu.in 
 
 Contact No: 91-771-2474032 
 
 
 
 
 Brief Profile : 
 
 Dr. Amit Kumar Agrawal is an Associate Professor in the Management & Business Informatics discipline. Prior to joining IIIT-NR, he was an Assistant Professor at Symbiosis International University, Pune, India. Dr. Agrawal is an MBA with a doctorate degree in Marketing from the Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee.  He has diversified job experience in leading banks, media houses, and educational Institutions. He has published more than 15 research papers in journals and conference proceedings of international repute. He has also served as a reviewer of papers/articles of many reputed international journals and conferences.  
  
 
 
 
 
 
 Research Interest 
 
 
 Customer Value Co-creation; Technological Adoption; Services; Consumer Behavior; Marketing. 
 
 
 
 
 Courses Offered 
 
 
 
 
 HS103C Environmental Engineering and Science, Spring 2017, 18 
 
 HS201C Digital Marketing, Autumn 2018 
 
 HS202C Basic Course on Entrepreneurship, Spring 2018, Autumn 2019 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Responsibilities 
 
 
 
 
 Faculty in-charge: Training & Career Cell 
 
 Member Secretary: Industry Academia Collaboration Cum Advisory Committee 
 
 Faculty in charge: Incubation Cell 
 
 Faculty in-charge: E-cell 
 
 Faculty in-charge: MHRD Institute Innovation Council 
 
 Faculty in-charge: Institute Social Media Marketing 
 
 Faculty in charge: Industry Academia Meet 
 
 Member: IIIT NR Website and Institute Promotional Committee 
 
 SPOC: Smart India Hackathon 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Professional Activities 
 
 
 
 
 August 2017- Till Date: Assistant Professor at Department of Management & Business Informatics, IIIT Naya Raipur 
 
 July 2017-August 2017:  Assistant Professor, Marketing at Symbiosis Institute of Management Studies, Pune. 
 
 Sept 2011-June 2012: Lecturer, Marketing at Noida Institute of Engineering & Technology, Greater Noida 
 
 Dec 2007-Sept 2010: Brand & Marketing Communication Officer- Radio Mantra 91.9 FM, UP East Region 
 
 July 2007-Dec 2007: Financial Service Consultant at ICICI Pru, Allahabad 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Awards And Accolades 
 
 
 
 
 Awarded Institute MHRD Fellowship by IIT Roorkee for pursuing PHD in Year 2012 
 
 Qualified UGC- NET with Management as a subject. 
 
 Awarded 4 times Station of Month award at Radio Mantra 91.9 FM in overall performance category. 
 
 Invited as a session chair for PAN IIT International Management Conference 2019 organised at IIT Roorkee. 
 
 Invited as a jury member for SkyHack Hackathon Challenge 2018 organised by Chhattisgarh Government on August 27, 2018.  
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Selected Publications 
 
 
 
 
 Agrawal, A. K., Nagendra, A., Divekar, R., & Bhoyar, P. K. (2018). An empirical examination of customer experience co-creation model in banking self service technologies. International Journal of Business Information Systems, 29(2), 268-280. 
 
 Agrawal, A. K., Kumar, D., & Rahman, Z. (2017). An ISM approach for modelling the enablers of sustainability in market-oriented firms. International Journal of Business Excellence, 12(1), 23-45. 
 
 Agrawal, A. K., & Rahman, Z. (2017). CCV Scale: Development and Validation of Customer Co-Created Value Scale in E-Services. Current Psychology, 1-17. 
 
 Agrawal, A. K. and Rahman, Z. (2015), “Roles and Resource Contributions of Customers in Value    Co-creation”,    International    Strategic    Management    Review,    3(1-2),    144-160 {Sciencedirect}. 
 
 Agrawal, A. K., Kaushik, A. K. and Rahman, Z. (2015), “Co-creation of Social Value through Integration of Stakeholders”, Procedia-Social and Behavioral Sciences, 189, 442-448. 
 
 Kaushik, A. K., Agrawal, A. K. and Rahman Z. (2015), “Tourist behavior towards self-service hotel technology adoption: Trust and subjective norm as key antecedents”, Tourism Management Perspectives, 16, 278-289{Science Direct} 
 
 Case Studies: 
 
 
 Pawar, S. and Agrawal, A.K. (2016), “Case Study: Netflix in India-Will it be a smooth run”, The Case Centre, (Case Reference No. 516-0203-1) 
 
 Conferences: 
 
 
 Agrawal, A.K. and Kamboj, P. Patient internet usage and its influence on interaction with physician.PAN IIT International Management Conference 2018, Organised by IIT Roorkee, Nov 3-Dec 2, 2018 
 
 Agrawal, A.K., Kaushik, A.K. and Rahman, Z. Consequences of consumer participation in value co-creation. NIDA International Business Conference 2016, Organised by NIDA Business School, March 12, 2016. 
 
 Agrawal, A.K., Kumar, D. and Rahman, Z. Developing a model of customer experience co- creation through customer SSTs innovativeness in context of India. National Seminar on Make in India: Strategies for Sustainable Growth & Development, Organized by IMS Dehradun, Jan, 6-8, 2016 
 
 Agrawal, A.K., Kumar, D. and Rahman, Z. Understanding the role of ‘process’ in value co- creation. 3rd Biennial Conference of the Indian Academy of Management (IAM), organized by IIM Ahmedabad, Dec 12-14, 2013. 
 
 Agrawal, A.K., Rahman, Z. and Kumar, D. Co-creation not everyone’s cup of tea: An exploratory investigation. 6th IIMA conference on marketing in emerging markets, organized by IIM Ahmedabad, Jan 5-6, 2015 
 
 Agrawal, A.K., Rahman, Z. Co-creation of values through the act of altruism. Vedic Foundations of Indian Management: New Insights on Co-creation and Entrepreneurship, Organised by Vedic Foundation of Indian Management (A unit of ISOL research foundation) and IIT Roorkee, Nov 28, 2014 
 
 Agrawal, A.K., Kaushik, A.K. and Rahman, Z. Co-creation of social value through integration of stakeholders. XVIIIth Annual International Conference of the Society of Operations Management, Organised by IIT Roorkee and ABVIIITM Gwalior, Dec 12-13, 2014. 
 
 Agrawal, A.K., Kaushik, A.K. and Rahman, Z. An exploratory study of organizational factors required to facilitate customer learning in co-creation. International Conference on Evidence Based Management 2015 (ICEBM2015), organized by Birla Institute of Technology & Science (BITS), Pilani, March 20-23, 2015.

title: Anurag Singh
content:
Designation: (ASSOCIATE PROFESSOR, ECE) 
 
 Qualification: Ph.D. (IIT Guwahati) 
 
 Department: ECE 
 
 Web Url: https://scholar.google.co.in/citations?user=bzoViqQAAAAJ&hl=en 
 
 Email Id: anurag[at]iiitnr.edu.in 
 
 Contact No: 91-771-2474033 
 
 
 
 
 Brief Profile : 
 
 Dr. Anurag Singh is an Assistant Professor in the Electronics and Communication Engineering discipline. Prior to joining IIIT-NR, he has been associated as a faculty with NIT Jaipur and Thapar University, Patiala, Punjab. Dr. Anurag received his Ph.D. in Biomedical Signal Processing from Indian Institute of Technology, Guwahati and M.Tech. from Indian Institute of Information Technology, Design & Manufacturing, Jabalpur. 
Dr. Singh was a part of the delegation for Indo-Japan student exchange program JENESYS-2011. He has been a recipient of International Travel Grant (Young Scientist) by Department of Science and Technology, Government of India. He has also been an invited speaker in many National level workshops. Dr. Singh has published several articles in journals and conference proceedings of international repute. He is serving as a peer reviewer in many reputed international journals and conferences. He has been an active member of IEEE, Signal Processing Society, and Engineering in Medicine and Biology Society. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Research Interest 
 
 
 Biomedical signal and image processing, Wireless Body Area Network (WBAN)-enabled remote healthcare applications using different physiological signals such as ECG, EEG, etc., Brain-computer interface-based applications, Multirate signal processing, Compressed sensing, Sparse representation and related applications 
 
 
 
 
 Courses Offered 
 
 
 
 
 ECE104C: Signals and Systems 
 
 ECE105C: Digital Signal Processing 
 
 CS101I: IT Workshop-1: Autumn 2017 
 
 EC101I: IT Workshop-1: Autumn 2017 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Responsibilities 
 
 
 
 
 Faculty In-charge: Communication Lab 
 
 Faculty Coordinator: B.Tech. Minor Projects 
 
 Coordinator: M.Tech. Admissions 2019-2020 
 
 Member: IT Infrastructure and IMS Development Committee 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Professional Activities 
 
 
 
 
 Sept, 2017-till date: Assistant Professor at Department of Electronics & Communication Engineering, IIIT Naya Raipur 
 
 July-Sept, 2017: Lecturer at Department of Electronics & Communication Engineering, Thapar University Patiala, Punjab 
 
 Jan-May, 2017: Guest Faculty at Department of Electronics & Communication Engineering, MNIT Jaipur, Rajasthan 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Awards And Accolades 
 
 
 
 
 Member of the delegation for Indo-Japan student exchange program JENESYS-2011 
 
 Received International Travel Grant-2017 from DST, Govt. of India 
 
 Invited Expert Speaker at National-level workshop "Medical Image Processing for Biomedical Applications and Additive Manufacturing using MAGICS and MIMICS-2018" at IIITDM Jabalpur 
 
 Invited Expert Speaker at National-level workshop "Biomedical Signal Processing and Applications" at Gauhati University Assam in 2016 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Research Supervision 
 
 
 
 
 Mrs. Nalini Pusarla- Brain Disease Detection using EEG signals , Supervisor 
 
 Mr. Satish Kumar- 5G Communication, Co-supervisor 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Selected Publications 
 
 
 Journals: 
 
 
 Anurag Singh, L.N. Sharma, S. Dandapat, “Multi-channel ECG data compression using compressed sensing in eigenspace”, Computers in Biology and Medicine (SCI Indexed), vol. 73, pp. 24-37, 2016, ISSN 0010-4825, Impact Factor: 1.836. 
 
 Anurag Singh, S. Dandapat, “Exploiting multi-scale signal information in joint compressed sensing recovery of multi-channel ECG signals”, Biomedical Signal Processing and Control (SCI Indexed), vol. 29, pp. 53-66, 2016, ISSN 1746-8094, , Impact Factor: 2.214. 
 
 Anurag Singh, S. Dandapat, “Weighted mixed-norm minimization based joint compressed sensing recovery of multi-channel electrocardiogram signals”, Computers & Electrical Engineering (SCI Indexed), vol. 53, pp. 203-218, 2016, ISSN 0045-7906, Impact Factor: 1.570. 
 
 Anurag Singh, S. Dandapat, “Block Sparsity-based Joint Compressed Sensing Recovery of Multichannel ECG Signals” IET Healthcare Technology Letters (PubMed Indexed), vol. 4, issue 2, pp. 50 – 56, 2017, ISSN: 2053-3713. 
 
 Anurag Singh, A. Kumar, G. K. Singh, “An efficient iterative method for nearly perfect reconstruction non-uniform filter bank”, International Journal of Speech Technology (Scopus Indexed), vol. 16, issue 3, pp. 261-272, 2013, ISSN 1381-2416. 
 
 A. Kumar, G. K. Singh,  Anurag Singh, “Design of nearly perfect reconstructed non-uniform filter bank by constrained equiripple FIR technique”, Applied soft computing (SCI Indexed), vol. 13, issue 1, pp. 353-360, 2013, ISSN 1568-4946, Impact Factor: 3.541. 
 
 A. Kumar, G.K. Singh,  Anurag Singh, “An optimized cosine-modulated non-uniform filter bank design for subband coding of ECG signal”, Journal of King Saud University - Engineering Sciences (Elsevier), vol. 27, issue 2, pp. 158-169, 2015, ISSN 1018-3639. 
 
 Anurag Singh, A. Kumar, “An improved design technique for multichannel non-uniform filter bank”, International Journal of Advanced Computer Engineering & Architecture, vol. 2, no. 2, pp. 161-169, 2012, ISSN: 2248-9452. 
 
 
 Book Chapter: 
 
 
  Anurag Singh, S. Dandapat, “Two-dimensional processing of multichannel ECG signals for efficient exploitation of inter and intra-channel correlation”, Advances in Communication and Computing, Springer, vol. 347, pp. 201-209, 2015, ISSN: 1876-1100. 
 
 Conferences: 
 
 
 Anurag Singh, S. Dandapat, “Exploiting inter-channel correlation in multichannel compressed sensing ECG systems”, IEEE UPCON 2015, IIIT Allahabad, pp.1-7, 4-6 Dec. 2015. 
 
 Anurag Singh, J. J. Nallikuzhy, S. Dandapat, “Compressed sensing framework of data reduction at multiscale level for eigenspace multichannel ECG signals,” IEEE NCC 2015, IIT Bombay, pp.1-6, Feb. 27 -March 1 2015. 
 
 Anurag Singh, S. Dandapat, “Distributed compressive sensing for multichannel ECG signals              over learned dictionaries,” IEEE INDICON, pp.1-6, 11-13 Dec. 2014. 
 
 Anurag Singh, L.N. Sharma, and S. Dandapat, “Compressive sensing in eigenspace for multichannel electrocardiogram signals,” IEEE International Conference on Advanced Electronic Systems (ICAES), CSIR-CEERI Pilani, pp.166-170, Sept 2013. 
 
 Anurag Singh and A. Kumar, "Simple iterative design technique for tree structured non-uniform filter bank”, IEEE International Conference on Recent Advances in Information Technology (RAIT-2012), IIT (ISM) Dhanbad, pp. 744-749, March 2012. 
 
 Anurag Singh and A. Kumar, "Design of tree structured non-uniform filter bank using modified window functions, IEEE National Conference on Computational Intelligence & Signal Processing (CISP-2012), pp. 165-170, March 2012.

title: Aruna Shukla
content:
Designation: ((ASSISTANT PROFESSOR (CONTRACT) ENGLISH)) 
 
 Qualification: Ph. D (NIT Raipur) 
 
 Department: SHM 
 
 Email Id: aruna@iiitnr.edu.in 
 
 
 
 
 Brief Profile : 
 
 Dr. Aruna Shukla is an Assistant Professor in the Department of Humanities and Management at IIIT Naya Raipur on a contract basis. She holds a Ph.D. in Indian English Literature from NIT Raipur.  She has one year of teaching experience at SSIPMT Raipur. She has published several research papers with Scopus and MLA indexing in esteemed journals. Dr. Shukla is a member of the English Language Teachers' Association of India (ELTAI). She has contributed to the academic community through her research and teaching. Her areas of expertise include Narratology, Indian English Literature, communication skills, and Personality Development. 
  
 
 
 
 
 
 Research Interest 
 
 
 Narratology, Indian English Literature, Communication Skills and Personality Development 
 
 
 
 
 Professional Activities 
 
 
 
 
 Assistant Professor, SSIPMT Raipur (September 2023-May 2024) 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Selected Publications 
 
 
 
 
 Shukla, Aruna, and Anoop Kumar Tiwari.  “Investigating Narrative Levels: A Narratological Approach to Kamala Markandaya’s A Handful of Rice.” Cogito Journal (SCOPUS). vol.15, issue 3, September 2023. 
 
 Shukla, Aruna, and Anoop Kumar Tiwari. “A Narratological Study of Kamala Markandaya’s Two Virgins: Interpreting Narratives through Saroja’s Focalized View.” IJLLC, vol. 3, issue 4, July-August, 2023. 
 
 Shukla, Aruna, and Anoop Kumar Tiwari. “ Analyzing Concept of Narrative Time in Kamala Markandaya’s Nectar in a Sieve: A Narratological Study.” IJELS vol. 8, issue-3, May-June 2023. 
 
 Shukla, Aruna, and Anoop Kumar Tiwari. “Narrative Technique and Focalization in Kamala Markandaya’s Possession.” Chronicle of Humanities and Culture Studies, vol. 6, Special Issue 1, June 2020.

title: Avantika Singh
content:
Designation: (ASSISTANT PROFESSOR, DSAI) 
 
 Qualification: Ph.D. (IIT Mandi) 
 
 Department: DSAI 
 
 Email Id: avantika[at]iiitnr.edu.in 
 
 Contact No: 91-771-2474059 
 
 
 
 
 Brief Profile : 
 
 Dr. Avantika Singh  is an Assistant Professor in Data Science and Artificial Intelligence discipline. Prior to joining IIIT-NR, Dr. Singh was an Assistant professor at IIIT Dharwad and IIIT Una.  She has completed her Ph.D  from the School of Computing, IIT Mandi  in the area of machine learning.  She has completed her B.Tech and M.Tech  from Uttar Pradesh Technical University, Lucknow and Amity University, Noida respectively. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Research Interest 
 
 
 Biometrics, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Reinforcement Learning, Indexing and Hashing 
 
 
 
 
 Selected Publications 
 
 
 
 Journals: 
 
 1)  Geetika Arora, Avantika Singh, Aditya Nigam, Hari Mohan Pandey, Kamlesh Tiwari, “ FKPIndexNet: An Efficient Learning Framework for Finger-Knuckle-Print Database Indexing to Boost Identification", Knowledge Based Systems, [Impact Factor: 8.03 (2020), Q1] 
 
 2)  Avantika Singh, Chirag Vashist, Pratyush Gaurav, Aditya Nigam,“A generic framework for deep incremental cancelable template generation", Neurocomputing (Neuro-21), [Impact Factor: 5.7 (2020), Q1] ]. 
 
 3)  Avantika Singh, Ashish Arora, Aditya Nigam,“Cancelable Iris template generation by aggregating patch level Ordinal relations with its holistically extended performance and security analysis", Image and Vision Computing (IMAVIS-2020), [Impact Factor: 3.103 (2020), Q1] 
 
 4) Avantika Singh, Aditya Nigam,“Effect of identity mapping, transfer learning and domain knowl-edge on the robustness and generalization ability of a network: A biometric based case study",Journal of ambient intelligence and humanized computing (JAIHC-2019), [Impact Factor: 7.1 (2019), Q1] 
 
 5)  Mrigank Krishan, Srinidhi Jha, Jew Das, Avantika Singh, Manish Kumar Goyal, Chandrra Sekar,“Air quality modelling using long short-term memory (LSTM) over NCT-Delhi, India", Air Quality, Atmosphere & Health journal, (AQAH-2019), [Impact Factor: 2.2 (2020), Q2] 
 
 Conferences: 
 
 1)  Avantika Singh, Pratyush Gaurav, Chirag Vashist, Aditya Nigam, Rameshwar Pratap,“IHashNet: Iris Hashing Network extracting patch ordinal features and indexed via. efficient multi-index hashing", International Joint Conference on Biometrics (IJCB-2020), Houston, USA 
 
 2) Avantika Singh, Ashish Arora, Shreya Hasmukh Patel, Gaurav Jaswal, Aditya Nigam,“FDFNet :A Secure Cancelable Deep Finger Dorsal Template Generation Network Secured via. Bio-Hashing", International Conference on Identity, Security and Behavior Analysis (ISBA-2019), Hyderabad,India . 
 
 3) Avantika Singh, Ashish Arora, Gaurav Jaswal, Aditya Nigam,“FDSNet: Finger dorsal image spoof detection network using light field camera", International Conference on Identity, Security and Behavior Analysis (ISBA-2019), Hyderabad, India 
 
 4) Avantika Singh, Shreya Patel, Aditya Nigam,“Cancelable Knuckle Template Generation Based on LBP-CNN", European Conference on Computer Vision Workshops, (ECCVW -2018), Munich, Germany 
 
 5) Avantika Singh, Aditya Nigam,“Encapsulating the Impact of Transfer Learning, Domain Knowledge and Training Strategies in Deep-Learning Based Architecture: A Biometric Based Case Study", Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Workshops, (CVPRW -2018), Salt Lake City, USA 
 
 6) Avantika Singh, Vishesh Mistry, Dhananjay Yadav, Aditya Nigam,“GHCLNet: A Generalized Hierarchically tuned Contact Lens detection Network", International Conference on Identity, Security and Behavior Analysis (ISBA-2018), Singapore 
 
 Book Chapters: 
 
 1) Avantika Singh, Gaurav Jaswal, Aditya Nigam, chapter entitled as, “Cancelable Biometrics: A Comprehensive Survey on Biometric Template Protection Schemes with Future Directives" in book entitled as “AI and deep learning in biometric security: Trends, Potential and challenges”,CRC Press, Taylor and Francis group, 2021

title: Bipin Chandra Mandi
content:
Designation: (ASSOCIATE PROFESSOR, ECE) 
 
 Qualification: Ph. D. (IIT Kharagpur) 
 
 Department: ECE 
 
 Email Id: bipin[at]iiitnr.edu.in 
 
 Contact No: 91-771-2474034 
 
 
 
 
 Brief Profile : 
 
 Dr. Bipin Chandra Mandi is an Assistant Professor in Electronics and Communication Engineering discipline. Prior to joining IIIT-NR, he was a temporary faculty at NIT Jamshedpur, Jharkhand India. His areas of interest are Embedded System Design, Digital Power Management Circuits, and VLSI Implementation. He has published several research papers in national and international journals and conference proceedings. He obtained his Ph.D. degree from the Department of Electrical Engineering, IIT, Kharagpur. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Research Interest 
 
 
 Embedded System Design, Digital Power Management Circuits, VLSI Implementation

title: CHANDRA SHEKHAR NISHAD
content:
Designation: (ASSISTANT PROFESSOR, MATHS) 
 
 Qualification: Ph.D. (IIT Kharagpur) 
 
 Department: SHM 
 
 Web Url: https://sites.google.com/site/csnishadiit/home?authuser=0 
 
 Email Id: chandrashekhar[at]iiitnr.edu.in 
 
 Contact No: 91-771- 2474229 
 
 
 
 
 Brief Profile : 
 
 Dr. Chandra Shekhar Nishad is an Assistant Professor in the Department of Science, Humanities and Management (SHM). Prior to joining IIIT-NR, he was an Assistant Professor in the Department of Mathematics, School of Technology, Pandit Deendayal Energy University (PDEU) Gandhinagar, India. He has completed M.Sc. (Mathematics & Computing) from IIT Guwahati in 2009 and M.Tech. (Industrial Mathematics & Scientific Computing) from IIT Madras in 2012. He has completed his Ph.D. degree in Applied Mathematics from IIT Kharagpur under the supervision of Prof. G.P Raja Sekhar in 2019. He has received DAAD Scholarship (DAAD IIT Master Sandwich Program) for doing M.Tech. Dissertation at Technical University Darmstadt Germany in 2011. He was the batch topper in M.Tech. (Industrial Mathematics & Scientific Computing) at IIT Madras. He has published more than 20 research papers in journals and conference proceedings of international repute. Currently, he is supervising one Ph.D. student in PDEU Gandhinagar as external co-guide. He has also served as reviewer of papers/articles of many reputed international journals and conferences. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Research Interest 
 
 
 Boundary Element Methods (Theory & Applications), Fluid Dynamics, Water Wave Problems, Coastal Engineering, Liquid Sloshing Dynamics. 
 
 
 
 
 Courses Offered 
 
 
 
 
 MA101C Discrete Mathematics, Autumn 2023 
 
 DA303C Optimization Methods in ML, Autumn 2023

 August 2012 - June 2013: Assistant Professor in the Department of Mathematics, National Institute of Technology Silchar, Assam. 
 
 September 2011 – May 2012: Guest Researcher, Institute for Nano- and Microfluidics, Centre of Smart Interfaces TU Darmstadt, Germany 
 
  July 2010-August 2011: Halftime teaching Assistant, Indian Institute of Technology Madras, Tamilnadu. 
 
 August 2009 - July 2010: Lecturer in the Department of Professional Courses, Meerut College Meerut, Uttar Pradesh.

 Recipient of the prestigious DAAD scholarship (IIT Master Sandwich Programme) for the M.Tech. thesis work in TU Darmstadt, Germany (Sept 1, 2011- May 31, 2012).

title: Deepika Gupta
content:
Designation: (ASSISTANT PROFESSOR, ECE) 
 
 Qualification: Ph.D. (IIT Indore) 
 
 Department: ECE 
 
 Email Id: deepika@iiitnr.edu.in 
 
 Contact No: 91-771-2474036 
 
 
 
 
 Brief Profile : 
 
 Dr. Deepika Gupta is an Assistant Professor in Electronics and Communication Engineering discipline. Prior to joining IIITNR, she has worked as an Assistant Professor (under Technical Education Quality Improvement Program III of Govt. of India) at Veer Surendra Sai University of Technology Burla, Odisha and Rajasthan Technical University Kota, Rajasthan. Dr. Gupta has received her B.E. degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering from University of Rajasthan, M.Tech in VLSI Design from NIT Jalandhar and Ph.D. degree in Electrical Engineering from IIT Indore. She received the institute “Gold Medal” from NIT Jalandhar and "Gargi award" from Govt. of Rajasthan for meritorious academic performance. she has published several research papers in journals and conference proceedings of international repute. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Research Interest 
 
 
 3D Charge Trap NAND Flash Memory, Advanced Non-Volatile Memories and Semiconductor Devices 
 
 
 
 
 Professional Activities 
 
 
 1.5 years of academic experience as Assistant Professor under Technical Education Quality Improvement Program III of Govt. Of India. 
 
 
 
 
 Selected Publications 
 
 
 
 Journals: 
 
 
 Deepika Gupta and S K. Vishvakarma, “Improved Short Channel Characteristics with Long Data Retention Time in Extremely Short Channel NAND Flash Device”, IEEE Transactions on Electron Devices,  Vol. 63, No. 2, PP. 668-674, Feb. 2016.  (IF : 2.6)

 S. Jain, Deepika Gupta , S K Vishvakarma and V. Neema, “Investigation of BE-SONOS Flash Memory along with Metal Gate and High-k Dielectrics Tunnel Barrier and its Impact in Charge Retention Dynamics,” Journal of Semiconductors, Vol. 37, No. 3, Jan. 2016.  (IF :0.8)

title: Kavita Jaiswal
content:

 Brief Profile : 
 
 Dr. Kavita Jaiswal has done Ph.D in the Department  of Computer Science and Engineering at National Institute of Technology (NIT) Raipur, Chhattisgarh India in the year 2022. She has received her M.Tech degree in Computer Science and Engineering from International Institute of Infor- mation Technology (IIIT) Bhubaneswar, Odisha India in the year 2018 and, received BE degree from Government Engineering College Bilaspur, Chhattisgarh India in the year 2015. She is an IEEE student member, member of Computer Society of India (CSI) and the associate member of the Institution of Engineers  India (IEI). 
  
 
 
 
 
 
 Research Interest 
 
 
 Her research interest includes Internet of Things, Wireless Sensor Network, Cloud Computing and Fog Computing.

 Cloud Computing 
 
 Data Communications

IEEE, 2018.[SCOPUS]

title: KRISHNANAND VISHWAKARMA
content:

 Brief Profile : 
 
 Dr. Krishnanand Vishwakarma is an Assistant Professor in Mathematics Discipline. Prior to joining IIIT-NR, he was an Assistant Professor in the Department of Mathematics, B.N College, Patna University, Patna (Bihar). He has completed his Ph.D. degree in Applied Mathematics from NIT Patna under the supervision of Dr. Moitri Sen in 2022. He was the first rank holder in master degree (M.Sc) and Gold medalist. He has qualified CSIR-NET/JRF and was a recipient of MHRD Fellowship during the Ph.D tenure. He has published several research papers in reputed International Journals and conferences. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Research Interest 
 
 
 Nonlinear Dynamics, Mathematical Biology/Ecology, Bifurcation Analysis.

title: Maifuz Ali
content:
Designation: (ASSOCIATE PROFESSOR, ECE) 
 
 Qualification: Ph.D. (IIT Kharagpur) 
 
 Department: ECE 
 
 Email Id: maifuzali[at]iiitnr.edu.in, maifuzali[at]hotmail.com 
 
 Contact No: 91-771-2474039 
 
 
 
 
 Brief Profile : 
 
 Dr. Maifuz Ali is an Assistant Professor in the Electronics and Communication Engineering discipline. Prior to joining IIIT-NR, he has been associated as a researcher with Florida International University (FIU), Miami, USA; University of Central Florida (UCF), Orlando, USA; Tokyo Institute of Technology, Tokyo, Japan and Korea Advanced Institute of Science and Technology (KAIST), Republic of Korea. Dr. Ali received his Ph.D. in Electronics & Electrical Communication Engineering, Indian Institute of Technology, Kharagpur, India. 
He has been an active member of the Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers (IEEE), USA and Institute of Electronics, Information and Communication Engineers (IEICE), Japan. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Research Interest 
 
 
 Numerical and analytical methods in electromagnetic, electromagnetic radiation and scattering, ray tracing, communication channel modeling, EMI sensors, radar cross section (RCS), millimeter wave technology, biological effects of electromagnetic ﬁelds, non-reciprocal devices. 
 
 
 
 
 Courses Offered 
 
 
 
 
 ECE 103C: Digital System Design 
 
 PHD702: Research Methodology 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Responsibilities 
 
 
 
 
 B.Tech Major Project Coordinator 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Professional Activities 
 
 
 
 
 Assistant Professor in Department of Electronics & Communication Engineering (ECE), International Institute of Informational Technology, Naya Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India since September, 2018. 
 
 Postdoctoral Research Fellow in Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering, Florida International University, Miami, Florida from November, 2017 to August, 2018 under the supervision of Prof. John L. Volakis. 
 
 Postdoctoral Research Fellow in Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering (ECE), University of Central Florida (UCF), Orlando, Florida, USA from July, 2016 to November, 2017 under the supervision of Prof. Raj Mittra. 
 
 Postdoctoral Research Fellow in Department of Electrical and Electronic Engineering, Tokyo Institute of Technology (TiTech), Tokyo, Japan from November, 2012 to May, 2016 under the supervision of Prof. Makoto Ando. 
 
 Postdoctoral Research Fellow in Electronics and Communications Technology Division, Korea Advanced Institute of Science and Technology (KAIST), Daejeon, Republic of Korea under BrainKorea (BK) 21 program from September, 2010 to November, 2012 under the supervision of Prof. Seong-Ook Park. 
 
 Visiting Scientist in Antenna and EMC Lab (LACE), Politecnico di Torino (Turin Technical University), Torino, Italy from March, 2010 to May, 2010 under the supervision of Prof.Giuseppe Vecchi. 
 
 Asst. Professor in the department of Electronics and Communications Engineering, National Institute of Science & Technology, Palur Hills, Berhampur - 761008, Orissa, India from February, 2009 to September, 2009. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Awards And Accolades 
 
 
 
 
 Young Scientist award by the International Union of Radio Science (URSI) headquartered at Belgium in 2011. 
 
 BrainKorea(BK)21 Postdoctoral Fellowships by Governments of South Korea (Republic of Korea) for 2010-1012. 
 
 National Scholarship by Ministry of Human Resource Development (MHRD), Governments of India (1998-2000). 
 
 Coordinators for Raj Mittra Grant in India (RMGI) is to support education and research in the ﬁeld of electromagnetics, especially computational electromagnetics with focus on providing opportunities to the upcoming generation of Ph.D. students since 2018. 
 
 Assistant to the coordinator/ Oﬃce for Global Human Resource Development (GHRD), Tokyo Institute of Technology, Japan to develop a collaborative program between Tokyo Institute of Technology, Japan and Indian academic institute -2015-17. 
 
 Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers (IEEE) Membership no.- 93419036 
 
 Institute of Electronics, Information and Communication Engineers (IEICE), Japan Membership no.- 9151014 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Research Supervision 
 
 
 
 
   Mr. Govind Prasad : Low Power VLSI Implementation for SRAM Memory Cell, Status: On-going 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Selected Publications 
 
 
 
 
 Maifuz Ali and Makoto Ando , “Fast Estimation of Field in the Shadow Zone for Finite Cylindrical Structures by Modiﬁed Edge Representation (MER) in Compact Range Communication”, IEICE Transactions on Communications, ISSN: 0916-8516, Volume E99-B, July 2016. 
 
 Maifuz Ali and Makoto Ando , “Fast Estimation of Shadowing Eﬀects in Millimeterwave Short Range Communication by Modiﬁed Edge Representation (MER)”, IEICE Transactions on Communications, ISSN: 0916-8516, Volume E98-B, No.09, pp.1873-1881, Sep. 2015. 
 
 Maifuz Ali, Takayuki Kohama and Makoto Ando , “Modiﬁed Edge Representation (MER) Consisting of Keller’s Diﬀraction Coeﬃcients with Weighted Fringe Waves and Its Localization for Evaluation of Corner Diﬀraction”, IEEE Transactions on Antennas and Propagation, ISSN: 0018-926X, Volume 63, Issue 7,pp. 3158-3167, July2015. 
 
 Yun-Taek Im, Maifuz Ali, and Seong-Ook Park, “Slow Modulation Behavior of the FMCW Radar for Wireless Channel Sounding Technology”, IEEE Transactions on Electromagnetic Compatibility, ISSN: 0018-9375, Vol. 56, Issue: 5, pp. 1229 - 1237, October-2014.

title: Mallikharjuna Rao K
content:
Designation: (ASSISTANT PROFESSOR, DSAI) 
 
 Qualification: Ph.D. (JNTU Hyderabad) 
 
 Department: DSAI 
 
 Email Id: mallikharjuna@iiitnr.edu.in 
 
 Contact No: 91-771-2474041 
 
 
 
 
 Brief Profile : 
 
 
 Dr. Mallikharjuna Rao K is currently serving as Assistant Professor (Grade-I) in the Department of Data Science and Artificial Intelligence at the International Institute of Information Technology (IIIT), Naya Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India. 
 
 Prior to this position, he worked as an Assistant Professor (Senior Grade-I) at VIT-AP University, Andhra Pradesh (2019–2021). He also served as an Associate Professor at Shri Vishnu Engineering College for Women, Bhimavaram (2018–2019). Earlier, he was associated with GITAM University, Visakhapatnam (2011–2018) and Gokaraju Rangaraju Institute of Engineering and Technology, Hyderabad (2007–2011) as an Assistant Professor. 
 
 Dr. Rao received his Ph.D. in Computer Science and Engineering (2018) and M.Tech. in Computer Science (2010) from Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Hyderabad (JNTUH). He earned his B.Tech. in Information Science and Technology from Acharya Nagarjuna University, Andhra Pradesh, in 2004. 
 
 He has successfully secured research funding, including a grant of ₹6 lakhs from the Department of Science and Technology (DST), Government of India, for organizing a National Workshop on Data Science Research at GITAM University, and ₹3.69 lakhs from NTPC Ltd. for research activities at IIIT Naya Raipur. 
 
 Dr. Rao has published over 60 research papers in reputed international journals and conferences. He holds one Indian granted patent and has two published Indian patents to his credit. 
 
 He served as an editorial board member and reviewer for several reputed SCI/WoS/Scopus-indexed journals, including IET Software, IEEE Sensors Journal, CMBBE, IJSAEM, JCS, JSR, IJECE, IJCS, BEEI, and IJSER. He has also chaired technical sessions at major international conferences, including IEEE WIECON-ECE 2022, ICCIDE 2022, and TRIBES 2021. Additionally, he has served as a Technical Program Committee (TPC) member and reviewer for various Springer and IEEE conferences, including WCAIC 2023, ICDSA 2023, CVR 2023, InC4 2023, ICCCT 2023, TENSYMP 2022, AIC 2022, and ICCIS 2022. 
 
 Dr. Rao is a Senior Member of IEEE, including IEEE Computational Intelligence Society (CIS) and IEEE Computer Society (CS), and a Life Member of the Computer Society of India (CSI). 
 
 
His research interests include Artificial Intelligence, particularly Evolutionary Algorithms, Swarm Intelligence, Machine Learning, Data Science, Data Mining, Data Privacy, Imbalanced Data Learning, and their applications in healthcare and finance. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Research Interest 
 
 
 Artificial Intelligence, Swarm Intelligence, Evolutionary Algorithms, Data Science, Software Reliability

 Brief Profile : 
 
 Dr. Manoj Kumar Majumder is an Associate Professor in the discipline of Electronics and Communication Engineering at Dr. Shyama Prasad Mukherjee International Institute of Information Technology, Naya Raipur (IIIT-NR), a position he has held since October 2024. Prior to this, he served as an Assistant Professor at the same institute from January 2017 to September 2024. He obtained his Ph.D. from the Microelectronics and VLSI Group, Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering, IIT Roorkee. 
Dr. Majumder has made significant contributions to research and academia, with over 65 publications in peer-reviewed international journals and more than 56 papers presented at reputed international conferences. He is a co-author of three books: Introduction to Microelectronics to Nanoelectronics: Design and Technology (CRC Press, November 2020), Through Silicon Vias: Materials, Models, Design and Performance (CRC Press, November 2016), and Carbon Nanotube Based VLSI Interconnects: Analysis and Design (Springer, New York, 2014). In addition, he has contributed five book chapters published by CRC Press and Springer. He holds three granted Indian patents. He has successfully completed four sponsored research projects funded by Anusandhan National Research Foundation (ANRF), Govt. of INDIA, Chhattisgarh Council of Science and Technology (CGCOST), and Indian Nanoelectronics User Program INUP (IISc Bangalore), with a total project value of ₹56.15 lakhs. His research interests span Low-Power VLSI Circuits and Systems Design, modeling of VLSI device and circuit performance parameters, emerging electronics, carbon nanotube and graphene nanoribbon-based VLSI interconnects, through-silicon vias, nanomaterials, and their applications. 
Beyond research and teaching, Dr. Majumder is actively involved in academic and administrative responsibilities at IIIT Naya Raipur. He has served in several key roles, including Controller of Examinations, President of the Students’ Activity Centre, Chairman of the Hostel Management Committee, and Warden. He has delivered technical talks at various national and international conferences and has served as Lead Guest Editor for a special issue titled “Next Generation Low Power VLSI Interconnects and Emerging Technologies” in the journal VLSI Design (Hindawi). Dr. Majumder is an active reviewer for several prestigious journals, including IEEE Transactions on Electromagnetic Compatibility, IEEE Transactions on Nanotechnology, IEEE Electron Device Letters, Microelectronics Journal, IET Micro & Nano Letters, IET Circuits, Devices and Systems, IETE Journal of Research, and other Springer journals. He is also a member of several expert committees constituted by government and non-government organizations. 
In recognition of his academic and research excellence, he has received the “A.P.J. Abdul Kalam Award” and the “Best Research Awards in Engineering, Medicine and Statistics” from the Association of Researchers and Academicians India (ARAI) and VDGOOD Technology Factory in December 2024 and September 2020, respectively. His name has been listed in Marquis Who’s Who in the World. Dr. Majumder is a Senior Member of IEEE and an active member of the IEEE Circuits and Systems Society and the IEEE Electronics Packaging Society. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Research Interest 
 
 
 Low Power VLSI Circuits and Systems Designing, Modelling of VLSI Device and Circuit Performance Parameters, Hardware Security, Emerging Electronics, Carbon nanotube and graphene nanoribbon based VLSI interconnects and Through Silicon Vias, Nanomaterials and their applications.

title: Punya Prasanna Paltani
content:
Designation: (ASSOCIATE PROFESSOR, Physics) 
 
 Qualification: Ph. D (BIT-MESRA, Ranchi) 
 
 Department: SHM 
 
 Email Id: punya[at]iiitnr.edu.in 
 
 Contact No: 91-771-2474013, 2474044 
 
 
 
 
 Brief Profile : 
 
 
 Dr. Punya P. Paltani is an Assistant Professor of Physics in the Science and Mathematics discipline. Prior to joining IIIT-NR, he was an Assistant Professor in Mody University, Rajasthan. He is a lifetime member of the Indian Physics Association, Optical Society of India, Senior member of Optical Society of America, and Senior IEEE Fellow. He was awarded Best Teacher Award by The Association of Engineers (India), CSIR Fellowship for doctoral research and TUBITAK Fellowship (by TURKISH Govt.) for Post-Doctoral research. He has published over 56 journal and conference papers; named 3 Indian patents, and authored a book on the topic ‘Optical Beam Propagation in Nonlinear Media and All-Optical Devices’.  
 
 
 
 
 
 Research Interest 
 
 
 Nonlinear optics, Photonics, Plasmonics and Photonic crystals. 
 
 
 
 
 Courses Offered 
 
 
 
 
 PH199C Physics, Autumn 2015 
 
 PH198C Engineering Physics, Autumn 2016 
 
 EC202C Sensors and Actuators, Spring 2016  
 
 PH101C Physics of Semiconductor Devices, 
 
 EC312E Optical Fiber Communication, 
 
 HS103C Environmental Engineering and Studies 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Responsibilities 
 
 
 
 
 HOD, Science and Mathematics & Humanities and Management. 
 
 Former Dean (Research & Development)

title: Rajarshi Mahapatra
content:
Designation: (PROFESSOR, ECE) 
 
 Qualification: Ph.D. (IIT Kharagpur) 
 
 Department: ECE 
 
 Web Url: https://sites.google.com/site/rajarshim/ 
 
 Email Id: rajarshi[at]iiitnr.edu.in 
 
 Contact No: 91-771-2474011, 2474045 
 
 
 
 
 Brief Profile : 
 
 Dr. Rajarshi Mahapatra is an Associate Professor in Electronics and Communication Engineering discipline. Prior to joining IIIT-NR, he worked in several academic institutes and industries in various capacity. In Rockwell Collins, Hyderabad, he worked on Software Defined Radio (SDR) and Electronic warfare system.He was a postdoctoral scholar in CEA-LETI, Grenoble, France during 2010-11. 
Dr. Mahapatra is an active reviewer for several IEEE transactions, IEEE magazine, publication from Elsevier, Springer, Wiley and many IEEE conferences. He has also served as organizing member and TPCmember for several national and international IEEE conferences. He has organized many workshops and has also been invited as a resource person in many workshops organized by prestigious research institutes. He is a Senior Member of IEEE and also a ComSoc member. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Research Interest 
 
 
 Cognitive radio, Signal processing Dynamic spectrum access, Green communication, Heterogeneous wireless network, Optical access networks and Molecular communication.

title: Ramakrishna Bandi
content:
Designation: (ASSOCIATE PROFESSOR, MATHS)

 Brief Profile : 
 
 Dr. Ramakrishna Bandi is an Assistant Professor in Mathematics discipline. He pursued his Ph. D from IIT Roorkee. Before joining IIIT NR, he was a Postdoctoral fellow at the Department of Electrical Engineering, IIT Bombay. He has published several research papers in referred International Journals and International Conferences.

title: Ruhul Amin
content:
Designation: (Designation: Assistant Professor (CSE)) 
 
 Qualification: Qualification: PhD(IIT-ISM Dhanbad) 
 
 Department: CSE 
 
 Contact No: 91-771-2474047 
 
 
 
 
 Brief Profile : 
 
 Dr. Ruhul Amin is an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering Discipline. Prior to joining IIIT Naya Raipur, he was an assistant professor of NIT Jamshedpur. Dr. Amin received doctoral (Ph.D.) degree in Computer Science and Engineering from the Indian Institute of Technology(ISM) Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India, in 2017 and received B.Tech and M.Tech both in Computer Science and Engineering from Maulana Abul Kalam Azad University of Technology, West Bengal, India in 2009 and 2013, respectively. He has authored many technical research papers published in leading international conferences and peer-reviewed international journals from the IEEE, Elsevier, Springer, John Wiley, etc.  He is an Associate Editor of “Security and Privacy” and "Security and communication networks" published by John Wiley and Hindwai respectively. He is an active senior member of IEEE and a member of ACM. 
 
 
In 2021, Stanford University has released a list that represents the top 2 per cent of the most-cited scientists in various disciplines. In recognition of exceptional research performance demonstrated by production of multiple highly cited papers, Dr. Amin made it to the list of Top 2% of the most cited scientists released by the US-based prestigious standford university.  
 
 
 
 
 
 Research Interest 
 
 
 Cryptography and Network Security, Cryptology, Authentication Protocol, WSN security, IoT security, Blockchain Technology, Firewall security, etc.

title: Sachchida Nand Mishra
content:

 Brief Profile : 
 
 Dr. Sachchida Nand Mishra is an Assistant Professor (Contract) at IIIT Naya Raipur in the Department of Data Science and Artificial Intelligence. He holds a Ph.D. from NIT Durgapur, West Bengal, India, along with M. Tech. in Operations Research from NIT Durgapur, Executive PG in Data Science from IIIT Bangalore, M. Sc. (Mathematics with Computer Science) from LNMU Darbhanga, and B. Sc. Honours in Mathematics from LNMU Darbhanga, India. His research interests include Fuzzy Graphs and Networks, Graph Theory, Operations Research, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Data Analysis. Dr. Mishra has completed his training of Innovation Ambassador (IA) under MoE’s Innovation Cell & AICTE during 2022-23. Dr. Mishra has published extensively in reputable journals and presented at national and international conferences. With over six years of teaching experience, he brings valuable expertise to renowned government academic institutions in India.

 Brief Profile : 
 
 Dr. Shailesh Khapre is an Assistant Professor in the Department of Data Science and Artificial Intelligence at DSPM IIIT-Naya Raipur, C. G. India. He received the B.Tech. Degree (Comp. Sci. & Engg.) from the NIT Rourkela, Orissa, in 2009, and the M.Tech. Degree (Comp. Sci. & Engg.) from Pondicherry University, Puducherry in 2011. He obtained a Ph.D. degree from the Pondicherry University, Puducherry, India in 2019-20 in the area of Information Retrieval. Earlier, he worked with the SRM-IST (Ghaziabad), and Amity University, Noida as an Assistant professor. 
Dr. Shailesh is a recipient of the Rajiv Gandhi National Fellowship (RGNF_2012) for the year 2012-2016 by the UGC, Govt. of India and has published research work in various reputed journals with IEEE, Elsevier, Springer, etc. His current research interest is in Intelligent Information Retrieval, Robot Perceptions, Sensory Fusion, Computer Vision, Machine learning, Localization, Planning, Navigation.

title: Shashi Tiwari
content:
Designation: (Assistant Professor (Contract) ECE) 
 
 Qualification: Ph. D. IIT (BHU) Varanasi 
 
 Department: ECE 
 
 Email Id: shashit@iiitnr.edu.in 
 
 
 
 
 Brief Profile : 
 
 Dr. Shashi Tiwari is an Assistant Professor (Contract) in the Electronics and Communication Engineering Department. Before joining IIIT-NR, she was associated as a faculty with NIT Raipur and RGU Guwahati Assam. Dr. Shashi Tiwari received her M.Tech  and Ph.D. in Microelectronics (Electronics Engineering Department, IIT(BHU) Varanasi. 
During her academic career, Dr. Tiwari participated in the Student Exchange Support Program funded by the Japan Student Services Organization (JASSO-2012) at KIT Japan, where she received a scholarship. She has published several articles in prestigious SCI journals and international conference proceedings. He is serving as a peer reviewer in many reputed international journals and conferences. 
  
 
 
 
 
 
 Research Interest 
 
 
 •	Micro- and Nano-electronic devices, Organic electronics and Sensors.
•	Fabrication and characterization of micro-and nano-electronic devices based on novel materials including organic and oxide semiconductors.
 
 
 
 
 
 Courses Offered 
 
 
 
 
 CS208C: Data Communication 
 
 MA201C: Random Process 
 
 IoT and Embedded Systems

 Awards And Accolades

 The Senior Research Fellowship (From January 2011 to December 2015) from the University Grant Commission (UGC) India. 
 
 2nd position in M-Tech, Materials Science and Technology (IIT-BHU). 
 
 Qualified in GATE 2008 Electronic and Communication Engineering.

title: Shrivishal Tripathi
content:
Designation: ( ASSOCIATE PROFESSOR, ECE) 
 
 Qualification: Ph.D (IIT Jodhpur) 
 
 Department: ECE 
 
 Web Url: https://sites.google.com/site/tripathishrivishal/home 
 
 Email Id: shrivishal[at]iiitnr.edu.in 
 
 Contact No: 91-771-2474051 
 
 
 
 
 Brief Profile : 
 
 
 Shrivishal Tripathi is an Associate Professor at the International Institute of Information Technology, Naya Raipur, Chhattisgarh. He previously served as an Assistant Professor at BITS-Pilani, Hyderabad, and NIIT University, Neemrana. He earned his Ph.D. in Electrical Engineering from IIT Jodhpur in 2015, an M.E. from PEC University of Technology, Chandigarh, in 2011, and a B.Tech. from Dr. K.N. Modi Institute of Engineering and Technology, Ghaziabad, in 2009. His main research interest includes UWB / MIMO Antenna, Antenna for 5G/6G and IoT, AI in Electromagnetics, ML/DL in RF Circuit Design, Energy Harvesting, UAV, and Signal Modulation/Demodulation Techniques. He has successfully completed 06 sponsored/consultancy projects as PI/Co-PI sanctioned by DST, IGKV Raipur, CCOST, and Mahyco Pvt. Ltd. In addition, 03 more projects are currently in progress. He has published 80+ papers in reputed Journals and international/national conferences. He has organized many workshops and FDP. He serves on the Standing Review Committee for the Radio Altimeter System in DRDO Hyderabad, a Ministry of Defense, Govt. of India division and IIRS-ISRO, Department of Space (DOS) Govt. of India outreach program's coordinator. He contributed in the "National Rogue Drone Policy." under the Ministry of Home Affairs (MHA).  
 
 
 
 
 
 Research Interest 
 
 
 Ultrawideband (UWB) Antennas ,	MIMO Antenna,	Antenna for 5G/IoT ,	Machine/Deep Learning in RF Circuit Design ,	UAV/Drone Detection & Identification ,	FMCW Radar, Signal Modulation/Demodulation Techniques, Ad-hoc Network

  Selected in second-level screening in DRDO Robotics & Unmanned Systems Exposition (DRUSE) conducted by DRDO at all India levels.

 Brief Profile : 
 
 
 Dr. Sresha Yadav nee Ghosh is an Assistant Professor of English in the Humanities and Social Sciences discipline. Prior to joining IIIT-NR, she was an Assistant Professor at GITAM University, Bangalore. She has qualified UGC-NET and was a recipient of MHRD IIT Roorkee scholarship assistance during her Ph.D. tenure. She has published several research articles in edited books and reputed journals having SCI and MLA indexing. She is a member of the Cognitive Science Society, ELTAI, Melus India, and the British Council.

title: Vijaya J
content:
Designation: ( (ASSISTANT PROFESSOR, DSAI)) 
 
 Qualification: Ph.D (NIT-Trichy)

 Brief Profile : 
 
 Dr. J. Vijaya is an Assistant Professor in the Department of Data Science and Artificial Intelligence at DSPM IIIT-Naya Raipur, C. G. India.  She obtained her Ph.D. degree from National Institute of Technology-Tiruchirappalli; India in the area of Data Science. She completed her Bachelor’s degree (Comp. Sci. & Engg.) from MS University-Tirunelveli, India and Masters Degree (Comp. Sci. & Engg.) from Anna University-Tiruchirappalli, India. Her current research interests are Data Analytics, Data Mining, Machine Learning Concepts, Soft computing Techniques, Neural networks and Deep learning, Metaheuristic and swarm Intelligence Algorithms, Evolutionary computation, Fuzzy logic and Rough set theory, Advanced clustering and Big Data Analytics. Totally she has 13 years of teaching experience in various institution and universities. Her objective is to pursue a challenging position in the field of Lecturing where she can effectively develop her skills and contribute them for the development of the Institution. She is a Member of Indian Society of Technical Education (MISTE) and also she acted as a coordinator in various institute level committees. She has published research work in various reputed journals. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Research Interest 
 
 
 Data Science, Data Analytics, Data mining and Data warehousing, Machine Learning, Soft Computing, Fuzzy set and rough set theory, Optimization Techniques, Deep learning and Big data.

title: Vinay Kumar
content:
Designation: (Assistant Professor, CSE) 
 
 Qualification: Ph.D. (CSE, IIT (BHU) Varanasi), 
 
 Department: CSE 
 
 Email Id: vinay@iiitnr.edu.in 
 
 
 
 
 Brief Profile : 
 
 Dr. Vinay Kumar is an Assistant Professor at IIIT Naya Raipur in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering.  He completed his doctorate at CSE, IIT (BHU) Varanasi. Prior to joining IIIT Naya Raipur, he served as an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at NIT Jamshedpur and BIT Mesra, Ranchi. He has published over thirty research papers in prestigious SCI journals and conference proceedings. In addition, he has served as a reviewer for numerous prestigious international journals and conferences. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Research Interest 
 
 
 Software Engineering, Reliability, Safety and Security Analysis of Computer based Systems, Mathematical Modeling, Machine Learning, Distributed Systems.

title: B. Yegnanarayana
content:
Designation: (Professor) 
 
 Qualification: Ph. D. (IISc, Bangalore) 
 
 Email Id: yegna@iiit.ac.in 
 
 
 
 
 Brief Profile : 
 
 Prof. B. Yegnanarayana, INSA Senior Scientist IIIT-Hyderabad and Ex-Professor at IIT Madras. He has more than forty five years of teaching and research experience. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Research Interest 
 
 
 Digital Signal Processing, Speech Processing, Computer Vision and Neural Networks

title: V K Jayaraman
content:
Designation: (Professor) 
 
 Qualification: Ph.D (University of Pune) 
 
 Email Id: vkjayaram@yahoo.com 
 
 
 
 
 Brief Profile : 
 
 Dr. V.K. Jayaraman has been with the Council of Industrial and Scientific Research (CSIR), India since 1976. He worked as a senior scientist in the chemical engineering division of the National Chemical Laboratory. He was also a CSIR Emeritus Scientist at the Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (CDAC), Pune. He has over twenty five years of teaching experience. His  research areas of interest include modeling and simulations in chemical and biochemical engineering, process modeling, control and optimization. For the last ten years he is working on applications of Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence to chemically reacting systems, process fault detection and monitoring, information security & chemo & bioinformatics. He has successfully completed projects funded by government agencies like Department of Science & Technology, Department of Biotechnology, NTPC and BHEL, etc. He has received several honors which include Hedillia Award by Indian Institute of Chemical Engineers for excellence in basic research in Chemical Engineering. 
  
 
 
 
 
 
 Research Interest 
 
 
 Computational Biology, Data Mining and Machine Learning, Chemo and Bio Informatics, Chemical Reaction Engineering.

title: Uday B Desai
content:
Designation: (Professor) 
 
 Qualification: Ph. D. (The John Hopkins University) 
 
 Email Id: ubdesai@iith.ac.in 
 
 
 
 
 Brief Profile : 
 
 Uday B. Desai received the B. Tech. degree from Indian Institute of Technology, Kanpur, India, in 1974, the M.S. degree from the State University of New York, Buffalo, in 1976, and the Ph.D. degree from The Johns Hopkins University, Baltimore, U.S.A., in 1979, all in Electrical Engineering. Since June 2009 he is the Director of IIT Hyderabad. He is the Mentor Director for IIT Bhilai and IIIT Chittoor. 
He has held faculty positions at different universities, Assistant and then Associate Professor at Washington State University and Professor at IIT Bombay. He has held Visiting Associate Professor's position at Arizona State University, Purdue University, and Stanford University. He was a visiting Professor at EPFL, Lausanne. He been the Director of HP-IITM R and D Lab. at IIT-Madras. 
His research interest is in Cyber physical systems, Internet of things, digital fabrication, wireless communication, cognitive radio, wireless sensor networks and statistical signal processing. He has been a coauthor of 9 research monographs and author of nearly 300 peered reviewed papers in international journals and conferences. 
He is a member of many central governmental committees and governing council of academic institutions. He was a member of the high powered committee for review of AICTE. He is on the board of Tata Communications Limited. 
Dr. Desai is a Fellow of Indian National Science Academy), Fellow of Indian National Academy of Engineering. He is the recipient of J C Bose Fellowship. He is also the recipient of the Excellence in Teaching Award from IIT-Bombay. In 2015 he received the Outstanding Alumni award from University of Buffalo and in 2016 he received the Distinguished Alumni Award from IIT Kanpur. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Research Interest 
 
 
 Cyber Physical Systems; Cognitive Radio; Intra and Inter Vehicular Communication; Wireless Sensor Networks; Pervasive Sensor Environment; Multihop Cellular Communication; Vehicular Communication; Mesh networking; Image and Video Fusion; Dim and single pixel target tracking in IR video; Technologies for enabling fast Rural Credit; Applications on Smart phones; Remote patient monitoring

title: S V Raghavan
content:
Designation: (Professor) 
 
 Qualification: Ph.D. (IIT Madras) 
 
 Department: Computer Science & Engineering 
 
 Email Id: sv.raghavan@gov.in 
 
 
 
 
 Brief Profile : 
 
 Former Professor of Computer Science and Engineering at IIT Madras. Chairs the Technical Advisory Committee of NKN, NOFN, and DTH. 
Professor S. V. Raghavan is a member of the STNET Sub-committee of the Scientific Advisory Committee to the Cabinet (SAC-C) and is an expert member of many project review boards of MIT, AICTE, MHRD, and DRDO. He is a fellow of the Institution of Electronics & Telecommunication Engineers and the Computer Society of India. 
Professor S. V. Raghavan has made significant contributions to the creation of the Education and Research Network in India. He was the founder of ERNET. For over fifteen years (1985-1999), he played a key and pioneering role in ERNET. He is popularly known as the Chief Architect of NKN. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Research Interest 
 
 
 Computer Networks and Protocols, Large Scale Network Design and Cyber Security, Electronic Commerce, Data Warehousing.

title: S K Gupta
content:
Designation: (Professor) 
 
 Qualification: Ph.D. 
 
 Department: Computer Science & Engineering 
 
 Email Id: skg@cse.iitd.ernet.in 
 
 
 
 
 Brief Profile : 
 
 Former Professor of Computer Science and Engineering at IIT Delhi. He was  Amar S Gupta Chair Professor, Department of Computer Science & Engineering at IIT Delhi. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Research Interest 
 
 
 Database Management System (DBMS), Data Mining, Index based Segmentation, Reconstruction Conjecture, Privacy in Databases

title: L.M. Patnaik
content:
Designation: (Professor) 
 
 Qualification: D. Sc. (IISc Bangalore) 
 
 Department: Computer Science & Engineering 
 
 
 
 
 Brief Profile : 
 
 Prof. L.M. Patnaik obtained his Ph.D in 1978 in the area of Real-Time Systems, D.Sc. in 1989 in the areas of Computer Systems and Architectures, both from the Indian Institute of Science, Bangalore. During March 2008 – August 2011, he was the Vice Chancellor, Defence Institute of Advanced Technology, Deemed University, Pune. Currently he is an Honorary Professor with the Department of Electronic Systems Engineering, Indian Institute of Science, Bangalore. 
He is Fellow of the IEEE, and The World Academy of Sciences (TWAS), Trieste, Italy, The Computer Society of India, Indian National Science Academy, Indian Academy of Sciences, National Academy of Sciences, and Indian National Academy of Engineering. He is a Life Member of the VLSI Society of India, and Instrument Society of India, a founder Member of the Executive Committee of the Association for the Advancement of Fault-Tolerant and Autonomous Systems; a Fellow of the Institution of Electronics and Telecommunications Engineers, and the Institution of Engineers. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Research Interest 
 
 
 Parallel and Distributed Computing, Computer Architecture, CAD of VLSI Systems, Theoretical Computer Science, Real-Time Systems, Soft Computing, and Computational Neuroscience.

title: Ashok Srivastava
content:
Designation: (Professor) 
 
 Qualification: Qualification: Ph.D (IIT, Delhi ) 
 
 Email Id: eesriv@lsu.edu 
 
 
 
 
 Brief Profile : 
 
 Prof. Ashok Srivastava, obtained M.Sc. (Physics-Advanced Electronics) degree from the University of Lucknow in 1968, M.Tech and Ph.D. degrees in Solid State Physics and Semiconductor Electronics area from IIT, Delhi in 1970 and 1975, respectively. He joined the Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering of Louisiana State Univeristy, Baton Rouge in 1990 and is Wilbur D. and Camille V. Fugler, Jr., Professor of Engineering in the School of Electrical Engineering & Computer Science. 
 
Prof. Ashok Srivastava is the recipient of prestigious 1979-1980 UNESCO Fellowship Award and Dean College of Engineering Award, Louisiana State University. He holds 2 US patents and several technology disclosures. He has authored/co-authored more than 200 technical papers also, he is the author of the book titled Carbon-Based Electronics- Transistors and Interconnects in Nanoscale and co-editor of two books titled, Nano-CMOS Electronics: Devices and Modeling and Circuits and Design. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Research Interest 
 
 
 : Low Power VLSI Circuit Design and Testability; Neuromorphic Chip Design; Nanoelectronics; Noise in Devices and VLSI Circuits; RF Integrated Circuits; Semiconductor Devices Modeling; Radiation-hard Integrated Circuits; and Low-Temperature Electronics.

title: JOSAA 2025
content:
JOSAA/CSAB (All India) candidates reporting: 
 
 Congratulations on getting admission to IIIT Naya Raipur through JOSAA .  
 
 The candidates admitted to IIIT Naya Raipur  through JOSAA/CSAB  can report physically from 18 th August 2025 to 22nd August  2025 .  Academic Session begins from 25th August 2025. 
 
 The following documents are required to be produced in Original for verification. 
 
 
 
 
 
 SNo 
 
 
 
 Details 
 
 
 
 
 1 
 
 
 
 10 th   Marksheet/Pass Certificate 
 
 
 
 
 2 
 
 
 
 12 th   Marksheet/Pass Certificate 
 
 
 
 
 3 
 
 
 
 Transfer Certificate  in original 
 
 
 
 
 4 
 
 
 
 Migration Certificate  in original 
 
 
 
 
 5 
 
 
 
 Character Certificate  in original 
 
 
 
 
 6 
 
 
 
 Certificate to support reservation under SC/ST/OBC-NCL   (status of OBC-NCL retained after April 01, 2025, as per JoSAA format ),  if applicable 
 
 
 
 
 7 
 
 
 
 Certificate to support reservation under Persons-with-Disabilities (issued by the competent authority only),  if applicable 
 
 
 
 
 8 
 
 
 
 JEE (Main) 2025 Rank Card showing CRL  
 
 
 
 
 9 
 
 
 
 Photo Identity Card   [issued by govt. agency/last attended school/class XII admit card] 
 
 
 
 
 10 
 
 
 
 Document supporting Permanent Address 
 
 
 
 
 11 
 
 
 
 Medical fitness certificate from a registered medical practitioner  
 
 
 
 
 12 
 
 
 
 4 copies of colour passport-size photographs 
 
 
 
 
 13 
 
 
 
 Filled the Anti-ragging undertaking from the following website  https://www.antiragging.in/affidavit_university_form.php   and bring the signed copy of online anti-ragging affidavit generated on the website 
 
 
 
 
 14 
 
 
 
 The balance fee (Rs 127150 minus (-) Amount Paid at JoSAA/CSAB#) can be paid through credit card/debit card/net-Banking* 
 
 # JoSAA/CSAB processing will be deducted  
 
 *Any additional amount from implementing GST/online transaction charges to the banker will be collected separately. 
 
 
 
 NOTE:  After the physical reporting, the candidates may return to their homes or stay in the hostel in a temporarily allotted room in Some Hostel until the hostel allotment is done for all the first years. During this period, candidates can have food on a payment basis in the canteen. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Each student in the first-year hostel will be provided with a  bed, mattress, study table, and chair . 
 
 
 
 For personal shopping needs, a local market is available at  Sector 24 , approximately  2 km  from the campus.

title: M. Tech (CSE / ECE) All India Spot Round 2025
content:
Applications are invited for the M. Tech. All India Spot Round at IIIT-Naya Raipur 
 
 Non-GATE candidates are also welcome to apply. 
 
 Orientation2025 schedule  
 
 Click here to Register for Spot Admission 2025   
 
 Last Date to Register : 18/08/2025 (@17.00 Hrs) 
 
 Spot Round Date : 20/08/2025 
 
 Admission Procedure 
 
 Step 1 : Fill out the registration form online. 
 
 Step 2 :
 
 GATE Qualified Candidates 
 
 Preference will be given to GATE qualified candidates, and will be shortlisted based on their score. 
 
 
 Non-GATE Candidates 
 
 An Institute Level Entrance Exam will be conducted on 20/8/2025 at 10.00 AM at IIIT Naya Raipur. 
 
 Exam duration is 60 minutes, and pattern will be as:
 
 Technical question based on GATE syllabus (CSE/ECE domain specific): 35 Question. 
 
 English language, General ability, and Mathematics: 15 Question. 
 
 
 Each correct answer will be awarded +1 marks, and 0.25 marks will be deducted for each wrong answer. 
 
 
 
 Step 3 : Selected candidates will undergo document verification and fee payment at IIIT-NR of Rs. 112,150/-. 
 
 All candidates must bring the original document along with one set of photocopies. 
 
 
 
 Vacancy Chart as of 14/08/2025 (will be updated timely)

title: SENATE
content:
Dr. Pradeep K. Sinha (Chairman) 
   
 Dr. Pradeep Kumar Sinha, an engineer turned academician, is the Vice Chancellor and Director of International Institute of Information Technology (IIIT), Naya Raipur. Earlier he was with the Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (C-DAC), where he had led National Programs in areas of Supercomputing, Grid Computing, and Health Informatics. 
   
 Dr. Sinha is an educationist, researcher, scientist, inventor, and internationally acclaimed author of computer textbooks. He has significantly contributed to the advancement of Science & Technology and Technical Education. His technical contributions include national projects, supercomputing systems and facilities, healthcare products and solutions, international patents, a number of technical papers and six books in the area of Computer Science & Engineering. 
 
 
 Prof. S V Raghvan 
   
 Former Professor of Computer Science and Engineering at IIT Madras. Chairs the Technical Advisory Committee of NKN, NOFN, and DTH. 
 Professor S. V. Raghavan is a member of the STNET Sub-committee of the Scientific Advisory Committee to the Cabinet (SAC-C) and is an expert member of many project review boards of MIT, AICTE, MHRD, and DRDO. He is a fellow of the Institution of Electronics & Telecommunication Engineers and the Computer Society of India. 
 Professor S. V. Raghavan has made significant contributions to the creation of the Education and Research Network in India. He was the founder of ERNET. For over fifteen years (1985-1999), he played a key and pioneering role in ERNET. He is popularly known as the Chief Architect of NKN. 
 
                                                                                                                                                                                          
 
 
 Prof. U B Desai 
 
 
 Uday B. Desai received the B. Tech. degree from  Indian Institute of Technology, Kanpur , India, in 1974, the M.S. degree from the  State University of New York, Buffalo , in 1976, and the Ph.D. degree from  The Johns Hopkins University , Baltimore, U.S.A., in 1979, all in Electrical Engineering. Since June 2009 he is the Director of  IIT Hyderabad . He wass the Mentor Director for IIT Bhilai and IIIT Chittoor. 
 He has held faculty positions at different universities, Assistant and then Associate Professor at Washington State University and Professor at IIT Bombay. He has held Visiting Associate Professor's position at Arizona State University, Purdue University, and Stanford University. He was a visiting Professor at EPFL, Lausanne. He been the Director of HP-IITM R and D Lab. at IIT-Madras. 
 He is a member of many central governmental committees and governing council of academic institutions. He was a member of the high powered  committee for review of AICTE . He is on the board of Tata Communications Limited. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
   
 
 Prof. Jaijit Bhattacharya 
   
 Dr. Jaijit Bhattacharya is a noted Government and Societal transformation expert and founder of Asteyax Labs, a bleeding edge payment Fintech firm. He is recipient of the prestigious APJ Abdul Kalam Award for innovation in governance and holds several patents in the mobile and payments space. He was formerly Partner and Head of Economics and Policy practice at KPMG. He is also President of Centre for Digital Economy Policy Research 
 (C-DEP)and Adjunct Professor at  IIT Delhi . He is also member of Expert Committee for Ease of Doing Business legislation of Government of India, co-chair of Expert Committee on Skill Development for Deity, Government of India and Convener for Economic Standards for Smart Cities, BIS, Government of India. 
 
 
 Lt. Col. Rajesh Kumar Mishra,  Registrar, IIIT-Naya Raipur 
   
   
 
 
 
 
 Prof . Rajesh Ingle, Dean (Academics) , HOD(CSE) and Member Secretary
