title: Board Of Studies
content:
Prof Rajesh Ingle, Dean  (Academics), HOD(CSE) and Chairman .                                                        
 
 
 
 Dr. Rajesh Ingle is a Dean (Academics), HoD (CSE) and Professor in Computer Science and Engineering, IIIT-NR.   He pursued his Ph. D. from CSE, IIT Bombay. Prior to joining IIIT-NR, he was a Professor in Computer Science and Engineering at PICT, Savitribai Phule Pune University, Pune, India and Adjunct Professor at Government College of Engineering Pune. He 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Prof. Balasundaram Subrahamaniam 
 
 
 
 Former Professor of Dept. of Humanities & Social Sciences, IIT Madras. Presently he is Adjunct Professor at School of Humanities and Social Sciences, IIT-Mandi. Prior to IIT Mandi, He was a Professor, Centre of German Studies, School of Language, Literature & Cultural Studies, Jawaharlal Nehru University, New Delhi.  
 His research areas are: German Literature and Political Philosophy. 
 
 
 
 
   
 
 Prof. Debabrata Das 
 
 
 
 Dr. Debabrata Das is serving as Professor and Hewlett Packard Chair at IIIT-Bangalore (IIITB). Before joining IIIT-B, he had served at G S Sanyal School of Telecommunication at IIT Kharagpur and later at Kirana Networks in New Jersey, USA. 
 He has received Prof. K. Sreenivasan Memorial Award 2017 for excellent teaching in the areas of Telecommunication from IETE. Dr. Das has received Global IEEE MGA Achievement Award 2012 and Outstanding Volunteer Award-2008 IEEE Bangalore Section. He is Fellow-IETE, Fellow-IE and SM-IEEE. He was Chairman of IEEE Bangalore Section 2017. He is Chairman of IT-Service Management Forum India (itSMF); Board Member of IIIT-Bhubaneswar; Technical and Empower Committee member of e-Governance for Govt. of Karnataka. Dr. Das was the Dean-Academic and R&D of IIIT-Bangalore 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Prof. Sudip Misra 
 
 Dr. Sudip Misra is a full Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at the Indian Institute of Technology Kharagpur. Prior to this he was associated with Cornell University (USA), Yale University (USA), Nortel Networks (Canada) and the Government of Ontario (Canada). He received his Ph.D. degree in Computer Science from Carleton University, in Ottawa, Canada, and the masters and bachelors degrees, respectively, from the University of New Brunswick, Fredericton, Canada, and the Indian Institute of Technology, Kharagpur, India. Prof. Misra has several years of experience working in the academia, government, and the private sectors in research, teaching, consulting, project management, software design and product engineering roles. 
 
 
 
 
 
   Dr. GVV Sharma 
 
 
 
 Dr. G. V. V. Sharma is currently employed at Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad India. He is an Associate Professor in the Department of Electrical Engineering, Coordinator of Teaching Learning Centre, and Head & In charge of National Resource Centre at IITH. He has received his PhD from IIT Mumbai. 
 He is interested to develop the teaching methodologies with practical orientation. 
 His areas of interest are Communication Theory, Signal Processing. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Dr. Preetam Kumar 
 
 
 
 
   
 Dr. Preetam has received his Ph.D. from IIT- Kharagpur. Presently he is Associate Professor at Dept. of Electrical Engineering, IIT-Patna. His research areas are: Physical Layer issues in Wireless Communication, Signal Processing for Communication Systems, VLSI for Communication , Wideband Antenna Design and Underwater Communication. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Dr. Sumeet Gupta 
 
 
 
 
   
 PhD. (Information Systems) from School of Computing, National University of Singapore, Singapore-2006. Presently he is an Associate Professor –Operations & System, IIM-Raipur (CG). He is accredited as Management Teacher in AIMA. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Dr. Mithilesh Kumar Chaube 
 
 
 
 Dr. Mithilesh Kumar Chaube is an Assistant Professor of Mathematics in Humanities & Social Science discipline. Prior to joining IIIT-NR, he was an Assistant Professor in RKGIT Ghaziabad, Galgotias University, Greater Noida and Echelon Institute of Technology, Faridabad. He has qualified CSIR-UGC NET and was a recipient of MHRD IIT-BHU scholarship assistance during his Ph.D. tenure. He has published several journal papers in journals of international repute. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Dr. Venkanna U. 
 
 
 Dr. Venkanna U. is an Assistant Professor in Computer Science and Engineering discipline. Earlier, he was a faculty at SR Engineering College, Warangal and Christu Jyoti Institute of Technology and Science, Warangal. He was a recipient of MHRD scholarship at NIT, Trichy during his Ph.D. tenure. He has published several research papers in International Journals (SCI Indexed) and International Conferences.
